search_text: Meta-Interpolation: Time-Arbitrary Frame Interpolation via Dual Meta-Learning 元插值：通过双元学习进行时间任意帧插值 Existing video frame interpolation methods can only interpolate the frame at a given intermediate time-step, e.g. 1/2. In this paper, we aim to explore a more generalized kind of video frame interpolation, that at an arbitrary time-step. To this end, we consider processing different time-steps with adaptively generated convolutional kernels in a unified way with the help of meta-learning. Specifically, we develop a dual meta-learned frame interpolation framework to synthesize intermediate frames with the guidance of context information and optical flow as well as taking the time-step as side information. First, a content-aware meta-learned flow refinement module is built to improve the accuracy of the optical flow estimation based on the down-sampled version of the input frames. Second, with the refined optical flow and the time-step as the input, a motion-aware meta-learned frame interpolation module generates the convolutional kernels for every pixel used in the convolution operations on the feature map of the coarse warped version of the input frames to generate the predicted frame. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations, as well as ablation studies, demonstrate that, via introducing meta-learning in our framework in such a well-designed way, our method not only achieves superior performance to state-of-the-art frame interpolation approaches but also owns an extended capacity to support the interpolation at an arbitrary time-step. 现有的视频帧插值方法只能在给定的中间时间步长处对帧进行插值，例如1/2。在本文中，我们的目标是探索一种更通用的视频帧插值，即任意时间步长的视频帧插值。为此，我们考虑借助元学习以统一的方式使用自适应生成的卷积核来处理不同的时间步。具体来说，我们开发了一个双元学习帧插值框架，以在上下文信息和光流的指导下合成中间帧，并将时间步长作为辅助信息。首先，构建内容感知元学习流细化模块，以提高基于输入帧的下采样版本的光流估计的准确性。其次，以细化的光流和时间步长作为输入，运动感知元学习帧插值模块为输入帧的粗扭曲版本的特征图上的卷积运算中使用的每个像素生成卷积核，以生成预测帧。广泛的定性和定量评估以及消融研究表明，通过以如此精心设计的方式在我们的框架中引入元学习，我们的方法不仅实现了优于最先进的帧插值方法的性能，而且还拥有支持任意时间步插值的扩展能力。 本文提出了一种基于双元元学习的视频帧插值方法，能够实现在任意时间步长的帧插值。 Shixing Yu,Yiyang Ma,Wenhan Yang,Wei Xiang,Jiaying Liu cs.CV

authors_text: V. A. Traag,L. Waltman
title: Causal foundations of bias, disparity and fairness
title_zh: 偏见、差异和公平的因果基础
abstract: The study of biases, such as gender or racial biases, is an important topic in the social and behavioural sciences. However, the literature does not always clearly define the concept. Definitions of bias are often ambiguous or not provided at all. To study biases in a precise manner, it is important to have a well-defined concept of bias. We propose to define bias as a direct causal effect that is unjustified. We propose to define the closely related concept of disparity as a direct or indirect causal effect that includes a bias. Our proposed definitions can be used to study biases and disparities in a more rigorous and systematic way. We compare our definitions of bias and disparity with various criteria of fairness introduced in the artificial intelligence literature. In addition, we discuss how our definitions relate to discrimination. We illustrate our definitions of bias and disparity in two case studies, focusing on gender bias in science and racial bias in police shootings. Our proposed definitions aim to contribute to a better appreciation of the causal intricacies of studies of biases and disparities. We hope that this will also promote an improved understanding of the policy implications of such studies.
summary: The study of biases, such as gender or racial biases, is an important topic in the social and behavioural sciences. However, the literature does not always clearly define the concept. Definitions of bias are often ambiguous or not provided at all. To study biases in a precise manner, it is important to have a well-defined concept of bias. We propose to define bias as a direct causal effect that is unjustified. We propose to define the closely related concept of disparity as a direct or indirect causal effect that includes a bias. Our proposed definitions can be used to study biases and disparities in a more rigorous and systematic way. We compare our definitions of bias and disparity with various criteria of fairness introduced in the artificial intelligence literature. In addition, we discuss how our definitions relate to discrimination. We illustrate our definitions of bias and disparity in two case studies, focusing on gender bias in science and racial bias in police shootings. Our proposed definitions aim to contribute to a better appreciation of the causal intricacies of studies of biases and disparities. We hope that this will also promote an improved understanding of the policy implications of such studies.
abstract_zh: 对偏见（例如性别或种族偏见）的研究是社会和行为科学的一个重要课题。然而，文献并不总是清楚地定义这个概念。偏见的定义通常含糊不清或根本没有提供。为了精确地研究偏见，有一个明确定义的偏见概念很重要。我们建议将偏见定义为不合理的直接因果效应。我们建议将密切相关的差异概念定义为包含偏见的直接或间接因果效应。我们提出的定义可用于以更严格和系统的方式研究偏见和差异。我们将偏见和差异的定义与人工智能文献中引入的各种公平标准进行比较。此外，我们还讨论了我们的定义与歧视的关系。我们在两个案例研究中阐述了我们对偏见和差异的定义，重点关注科学中的性别偏见和警察枪击事件中的种族偏见。我们提出的定义旨在有助于更好地理解偏见和差异研究的因果关系。我们希望这也将促进人们更好地理解此类研究的政策影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过因果关系定义偏见和差异，并探讨其与公平性及歧视的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对偏见和差异的定义模糊或缺失，需建立严谨的因果框架以系统研究社会不平等现象。
AI.method: 提出偏见为‘未正当化的直接因果效应’，差异为‘包含偏见的直接或间接因果效应’，并通过性别偏见与种族偏见案例验证定义。
AI.result: 构建了因果定义体系，明确了与AI公平性标准的关联，并通过实证案例展示了方法的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于深入理解偏见与差异的因果机制，为政策制定提供理论支持。

authors_text: Sathya Krishnan Suresh,Shunmugapriya P
title: Generic Approach to Visualization of Time Series Data
title_zh: 时间序列数据可视化的通用方法
comment: 5 pages. International Conference on Engineering and Advancement in Technology-2022
comments: 5 pages. International Conference on Engineering and Advancement in Technology-2022
abstract: Time series is a collection of data instances that are ordered according to a time stamp. Stock prices, temperature, etc are examples of time series data in real life. Time series data are used for forecasting sales, predicting trends. Visualization is the process of visually representing data or the relationship between features of a data either in a two-dimensional plot or a three-dimensional plot. Visualizing the time series data constitutes an important part of the process for working with a time series dataset. Visualizing the data not only helps in the modelling process but it can also be used to identify trends and features that cause those trends. In this work, we take a real-life time series dataset and analyse how the target feature relates to other features of the dataset through visualization. From the work that has been carried out, we present an effective method of visualization for time series data which will be much useful for machine learning modelling with such datasets.

abstract_zh: 时间序列是根据时间戳排序的数据实例的集合。股票价格、温度等都是现实生活中时间序列数据的例子。时间序列数据用于预测销售、预测趋势。可视化是在二维图或三维图中直观地表示数据或数据特征之间关系的过程。时间序列数据可视化是时间序列数据集处理过程的重要组成部分。可视化数据不仅有助于建模过程，而且还可以用于识别趋势以及导致这些趋势的特征。在这项工作中，我们采用现实生活中的时间序列数据集，并通过可视化分析目标特征与数据集的其他特征之间的关系。根据已经开展的工作，我们提出了一种有效的时间序列数据可视化方法，这对于使用此类数据集进行机器学习建模非常有用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用的时间序列数据可视化方法，用于分析特征关系并辅助机器学习建模。
AI.motivation: 时间序列数据可视化对于识别趋势和特征关系至关重要，但缺乏有效的通用方法，需改进以提升建模效率。
AI.method: 通过可视化技术分析真实时间序列数据集中的目标特征与其他特征的关系，提出一种有效的可视化方法。
AI.result: 提出的方法有效展示了时间序列数据中的趋势和特征关系，为机器学习建模提供了支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了可视化在时间序列分析中的重要性，为未来研究和应用提供了有效工具。

conclusion: 该方法验证了可视化在时间序列分析中的重要性，为未来研究和应用提供了有效工具。
search_text: Generic Approach to Visualization of Time Series Data 时间序列数据可视化的通用方法 Time series is a collection of data instances that are ordered according to a time stamp. Stock prices, temperature, etc are examples of time series data in real life. Time series data are used for forecasting sales, predicting trends. Visualization is the process of visually representing data or the relationship between features of a data either in a two-dimensional plot or a three-dimensional plot. Visualizing the time series data constitutes an important part of the process for working with a time series dataset. Visualizing the data not only helps in the modelling process but it can also be used to identify trends and features that cause those trends. In this work, we take a real-life time series dataset and analyse how the target feature relates to other features of the dataset through visualization. From the work that has been carried out, we present an effective method of visualization for time series data which will be much useful for machine learning modelling with such datasets. 时间序列是根据时间戳排序的数据实例的集合。股票价格、温度等都是现实生活中时间序列数据的例子。时间序列数据用于预测销售、预测趋势。可视化是在二维图或三维图中直观地表示数据或数据特征之间关系的过程。时间序列数据可视化是时间序列数据集处理过程的重要组成部分。可视化数据不仅有助于建模过程，而且还可以用于识别趋势以及导致这些趋势的特征。在这项工作中，我们采用现实生活中的时间序列数据集，并通过可视化分析目标特征与数据集的其他特征之间的关系。根据已经开展的工作，我们提出了一种有效的时间序列数据可视化方法，这对于使用此类数据集进行机器学习建模非常有用。 提出一种通用的时间序列数据可视化方法，用于分析特征关系并辅助机器学习建模。 Sathya Krishnan Suresh,Shunmugapriya P cs.HC

authors_text: Anja Heim,Eduard Gröller,Christoph Heinzl
title: AccuStripes: Adaptive Binning for the Visual Comparison of Univariate Data Distributions
title_zh: AccuStripes：用于单变量数据分布视觉比较的自适应分箱
abstract: Understanding and comparing distributions of data (e.g., regarding their modes, shapes, or outliers) is a common challenge in many scientific disciplines. Typically, this challenge is addressed using side-by-side comparisons of histograms or density plots. However, comparing multiple density plots is mentally demanding. Uniform histograms often represent distributions imprecisely since missing values, outliers, or modes are hidden by a grouping of equal size. In this paper, a novel type of overview visualization for the comparison of univariate data distributions is presented: AccuStripes (i.e., accumulated stripes) is a new visual metaphor encoding accumulations of data distributions according to adaptive binning using color coded stripes of irregular width. We provide detailed insights about challenges of binning. Specifically, we explore different adaptive binning concepts such as Bayesian Blocks binning and Jenks Natural Breaks binning for the computation of binning boundaries, in terms of their capabilities to represent the datasets as accurately as possible. In addition, we discuss issues arising with the representation of designs for the comparative visualization of distributions: To allow for a comparison of many distributions, their accumulated representations are plotted below each other in a stacked mode. Based on our findings, we propose three different layouts for comparative visualization of multiple distributions. The usefulness of AccuStripes is investigated using a statistical evaluation of the binning methods. Using a similarity metric from cluster analysis, it is shown, which binning method statistically yields the best grouping results. Through a user study we evaluate, which binning strategy visually represents the distribution in the most intuitive form and investigate, which layout allows the user the comparison of many distributions in the most effortless way.

We provide detailed insights about challenges of binning. Specifically, we explore different adaptive binning concepts such as Bayesian Blocks binning and Jenks Natural Breaks binning for the computation of binning boundaries, in terms of their capabilities to represent the datasets as accurately as possible. In addition, we discuss issues arising with the representation of designs for the comparative visualization of distributions: To allow for a comparison of many distributions, their accumulated representations are plotted below each other in a stacked mode. Based on our findings, we propose three different layouts for comparative visualization of multiple distributions. abstract_zh: 理解和比较数据的分布（例如，关于它们的模式、形状或异常值）是许多科学学科中的常见挑战。通常，可以使用直方图或密度图的并排比较来解决这一挑战。然而，比较多个密度图对智力要求很高。均匀直方图通常不精确地表示分布，因为缺失值、离群值或模式被相同大小的分组隐藏。在本文中，提出了一种用于比较单变量数据分布的新型概述可视化：AccuStripes（即累积条纹）是一种新的视觉隐喻，根据使用不规则宽度的颜色编码条纹的自适应分箱对数据分布的累积进行编码。我们提供有关分箱挑战的详细见解。具体来说，我们探索了不同的自适应分箱概念，例如用于计算分箱边界的贝叶斯块分箱和 Jenks Natural Breaks 分箱，以及它们尽可能准确地表示数据集的能力。此外，我们还讨论了用于分布比较可视化的设计表示所产生的问题：为了允许比较许多分布，它们的累积表示以堆叠模式绘制在彼此下方。根据我们的发现，我们提出了三种不同的布局来比较多个分布的可视化。 AccuStripes 的实用性是通过对分箱方法进行统计评估来研究的。使用聚类分析中的相似性度量，可以看出哪种分箱方法在统计上产生最佳分组结果。通过用户研究，我们评估哪种分箱策略以最直观的形式直观地表示分布，并调查哪种布局允许用户以最轻松的方式比较许多分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AccuStripes的可视化方法，通过自适应分箱技术对单变量数据分布进行直观比较。
AI.motivation: 传统直方图和密度图在比较多个分布时存在精度不足的问题，无法有效呈现模式、异常值等细节，导致视觉认知负担加重。
AI.method: 采用自适应分箱算法（如贝叶斯块分箱、Jenks自然断点分箱）生成不等宽彩色条纹，并通过堆叠布局实现多分布对比可视化。
AI.result: 统计评估表明贝叶斯块分箱在分组准确性上表现最佳，用户研究验证了该方法在直观性和比较效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: AccuStripes通过自适应分箱和创新布局设计，有效解决了多分布比较中的精度与可读性矛盾，为数据分布分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Dominik Vietinghoff,Michael Böttinger,Gerik Scheuermann,Christian Heine
title: Visualizing Confidence Intervals for Critical Point Probabilities in 2D Scalar Field Ensembles
title_zh: 可视化二维标量场系综中临界点概率的置信区间
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, to appear in an IEEE VGTC sponsored conference
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, to appear in an IEEE VGTC sponsored conference
abstract: An important task in visualization is the extraction and highlighting of dominant features in data to support users in their analysis process. Topological methods are a well-known means of identifying such features in deterministic fields. However, many real-world phenomena studied today are the result of a chaotic system that cannot be fully described by a single simulation. Instead, the variability of such systems is usually captured with ensemble simulations that produce a variety of possible outcomes of the simulated process. The topological analysis of such ensemble data sets and uncertain data, in general, is less well studied. In this work, we present an approach for the computation and visual representation of confidence intervals for the occurrence probabilities of critical points in ensemble data sets. We demonstrate the added value of our approach over existing methods for critical point prediction in uncertain data on a synthetic data set and show its applicability to a data set from climate research.
summary: An important task in visualization is the extraction and highlighting of dominant features in data to support users in their analysis process. Topological methods are a well-known means of identifying such features in deterministic fields. However, many real-world phenomena studied today are the result of a chaotic system that cannot be fully described by a single simulation. Instead, the variability of such systems is usually captured with ensemble simulations that produce a variety of possible outcomes of the simulated process. The topological analysis of such ensemble data sets and uncertain data, in general, is less well studied. In this work, we present an approach for the computation and visual representation of confidence intervals for the occurrence probabilities of critical points in ensemble data sets. We demonstrate the added value of our approach over existing methods for critical point prediction in uncertain data on a synthetic data set and show its applicability to a data set from climate research.
abstract_zh: 可视化的一项重要任务是提取和突出显示数据中的主要特征，以支持用户的分析过程。拓扑方法是识别确定性领域中此类特征的众所周知的方法。然而，当今研究的许多现实世界现象都是混沌系统的结果，无法通过单一模拟来完全描述。相反，此类系统的可变性通常通过集成模拟来捕获，从而产生模拟过程的各种可能结果。一般来说，此类集合数据集和不确定数据的拓扑分析研究较少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种计算和可视化表示集合数据集中关键点出现概率的置信区间的方法。我们展示了我们的方法相对于合成数据集上的不确定数据的临界点预测的现有方法的附加价值，并展示了其对气候研究数据集的适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算和可视化二维标量场集合中临界点概率置信区间的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑方法难以处理集合模拟中的不确定性，需开发新方法以准确评估临界点出现的概率区间。
AI.method: 通过计算集合数据集中临界点出现概率的置信区间，并设计可视化方法展示这些区间。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和气候研究数据集上验证了方法的有效性，证明其优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持对不确定数据中临界点概率的分析，提升可视化分析的可靠性。

authors_text: Artyom Sorokin,Nazar Buzun,Leonid Pugachev,Mikhail Burtsev
title: Explain My Surprise: Learning Efficient Long-Term Memory by Predicting Uncertain Outcomes
title_zh: 解释一下我的惊讶：通过预测不确定的结果来学习有效的长期记忆
comment: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: In many sequential tasks, a model needs to remember relevant events from the distant past to make correct predictions. Unfortunately, a straightforward application of gradient based training requires intermediate computations to be stored for every element of a sequence. This requires to store prohibitively large intermediate data if a sequence consists of thousands or even millions elements, and as a result, makes learning of very long-term dependencies infeasible. However, the majority of sequence elements can usually be predicted by taking into account only temporally local information. On the other hand, predictions affected by long-term dependencies are sparse and characterized by high uncertainty given only local information. We propose MemUP, a new training method that allows to learn long-term dependencies without backpropagating gradients through the whole sequence at a time. This method can potentially be applied to any recurrent architecture. LSTM network trained with MemUP performs better or comparable to baselines while requiring to store less intermediate data.
summary: In many sequential tasks, a model needs to remember relevant events from the distant past to make correct predictions. Unfortunately, a straightforward application of gradient based training requires intermediate computations to be stored for every element of a sequence. This requires to store prohibitively large intermediate data if a sequence consists of thousands or even millions elements, and as a result, makes learning of very long-term dependencies infeasible. However, the majority of sequence elements can usually be predicted by taking into account only temporally local information. On the other hand, predictions affected by long-term dependencies are sparse and characterized by high uncertainty given only local information. We propose MemUP, a new training method that allows to learn long-term dependencies without backpropagating gradients through the whole sequence at a time. This method can potentially be applied to any recurrent architecture. LSTM network trained with MemUP performs better or comparable to baselines while requiring to store less intermediate data.
abstract_zh: 在许多连续任务中，模型需要记住遥远过去的相关事件才能做出正确的预测。不幸的是，基于梯度的训练的直接应用需要为序列的每个元素存储中间计算。如果序列由数千甚至数百万个元素组成，则需要存储非常大的中间数据，因此，使得学习非常长期的依赖关系变得不可行。然而，大多数序列元素通常可以通过仅考虑时间局部信息来预测。另一方面，受长期依赖性影响的预测是稀疏的，并且在仅给出局部信息的情况下具有高度不确定性。我们提出了 MemUP，这是一种新的训练方法，可以学习长期依赖关系，而无需一次在整个序列中反向传播梯度。该方法可以应用于任何循环架构。使用 MemUP 训练的 LSTM 网络表现更好或与基线相当，同时需要存储更少的中间数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MemUP的新训练方法，旨在通过预测不确定结果来学习高效的长期记忆，从而在不回溯整个序列的情况下处理长期依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降方法在处理长序列时需要存储大量中间数据，导致计算资源消耗过大且难以学习长期依赖。而多数序列元素可通过局部信息预测，仅少数依赖长期信息的预测存在高不确定性。
AI.method: MemUP通过预测受长期依赖影响的不确定结果进行训练，无需对整个序列进行梯度回溯，适用于任何循环神经网络架构。
AI.result: 使用MemUP训练的LSTM在保持或提升性能的同时，显著减少了中间数据存储需求。
AI.conclusion: MemUP为解决长序列建模中的长期依赖问题提供了高效且内存友好的训练方法，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Explain My Surprise: Learning Efficient Long-Term Memory by Predicting Uncertain Outcomes 解释一下我的惊讶：通过预测不确定的结果来学习有效的长期记忆 In many sequential tasks, a model needs to remember relevant events from the distant past to make correct predictions. Unfortunately, a straightforward application of gradient based training requires intermediate computations to be stored for every element of a sequence. This requires to store prohibitively large intermediate data if a sequence consists of thousands or even millions elements, and as a result, makes learning of very long-term dependencies infeasible. However, the majority of sequence elements can usually be predicted by taking into account only temporally local information. On the other hand, predictions affected by long-term dependencies are sparse and characterized by high uncertainty given only local information. We propose MemUP, a new training method that allows to learn long-term dependencies without backpropagating gradients through the whole sequence at a time. This method can potentially be applied to any recurrent architecture. LSTM network trained with MemUP performs better or comparable to baselines while requiring to store less intermediate data. 在许多连续任务中，模型需要记住遥远过去的相关事件才能做出正确的预测。不幸的是，基于梯度的训练的直接应用需要为序列的每个元素存储中间计算。如果序列由数千甚至数百万个元素组成，则需要存储非常大的中间数据，因此，使得学习非常长期的依赖关系变得不可行。然而，大多数序列元素通常可以通过仅考虑时间局部信息来预测。另一方面，受长期依赖性影响的预测是稀疏的，并且在仅给出局部信息的情况下具有高度不确定性。我们提出了 MemUP，这是一种新的训练方法，可以学习长期依赖关系，而无需一次在整个序列中反向传播梯度。该方法可以应用于任何循环架构。使用 MemUP 训练的 LSTM 网络表现更好或与基线相当，同时需要存储更少的中间数据。 本文提出了一种名为MemUP的新训练方法，旨在通过预测不确定结果来学习高效的长期记忆，从而在不回溯整个序列的情况下处理长期依赖问题。 Artyom Sorokin,Nazar Buzun,Leonid Pugachev,Mikhail Burtsev cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zachary Deridder,Nyle Siddiqui,Thomas Reither,Rushit Dave,Brendan Pelto,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala
title: Continuous User Authentication Using Machine Learning and Multi-Finger Mobile Touch Dynamics with a Novel Dataset
title_zh: 使用机器学习和多指移动触摸动态以及新颖的数据集进行连续用户身份验证
abstract: As technology grows and evolves rapidly, it is increasingly clear that mobile devices are more commonly used for sensitive matters than ever before. A need to authenticate users continuously is sought after as a single-factor or multi factor authentication may only initially validate a user, which does not help if an impostor can bypass this initial validation. The field of touch dynamics emerges as a clear way to non intrusively collect data about a user and their behaviors in order to develop and make imperative security related decisions in real time. In this paper we present a novel dataset consisting of tracking 25 users playing two mobile games Snake.io and Minecraft each for 10 minutes, along with their relevant gesture data. From this data, we ran machine learning binary classifiers namely Random Forest and K Nearest Neighbor to attempt to authenticate whether a sample of a particular users actions were genuine. Our strongest model returned an average accuracy of roughly 93% for both games, showing touch dynamics can differentiate users effectively and is a feasible consideration for authentication schemes. Our dataset can be observed at https://github.com/zderidder/MC-Snake-Results
summary: As technology grows and evolves rapidly, it is increasingly clear that mobile devices are more commonly used for sensitive matters than ever before. A need to authenticate users continuously is sought after as a single-factor or multi factor authentication may only initially validate a user, which does not help if an impostor can bypass this initial validation. The field of touch dynamics emerges as a clear way to non intrusively collect data about a user and their behaviors in order to develop and make imperative security related decisions in real time. In this paper we present a novel dataset consisting of tracking 25 users playing two mobile games Snake.io and Minecraft each for 10 minutes, along with their relevant gesture data. From this data, we ran machine learning binary classifiers namely Random Forest and K Nearest Neighbor to attempt to authenticate whether a sample of a particular users actions were genuine. Our strongest model returned an average accuracy of roughly 93% for both games, showing touch dynamics can differentiate users effectively and is a feasible consideration for authentication schemes. Our dataset can be observed at https://github.com/zderidder/MC-Snake-Results
abstract_zh: 随着技术的快速发展和发展，越来越明显的是，移动设备比以往任何时候都更常用于敏感事务。人们寻求持续对用户进行身份验证的需求，因为单因素或多因素身份验证可能只能在最初验证用户，如果冒名顶替者可以绕过此初始验证，则这无济于事。触摸动态领域的出现是一种清晰的方式，可以非侵入性地收集有关用户及其行为的数据，以便实时开发和做出必要的安全相关决策。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的数据集，其中包含跟踪 25 位玩 Snake.io 和 Minecraft 两款手机游戏各 10 分钟的用户及其相关手势数据。根据这些数据，我们运行机器学习二元分类器，即随机森林和 K 最近邻，以尝试验证特定用户操作的样本是否真实。我们最强大的模型对这两款游戏的平均准确率约为 93%，这表明触摸动态可以有效地区分用户，并且是身份验证方案的可行考虑因素。我们的数据集可以在 https://github.com/zderidder/MC-Snake-Results 上观察

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习和多指触摸动态的连续用户认证方法，并构建了一个新的数据集。
AI.motivation: 随着移动设备在敏感事务中的使用增加，传统的单因素或多因素认证方式无法防止冒充者绕过初始验证，因此需要一种连续的用户认证方法。
AI.method: 通过跟踪25名用户在两个移动游戏（Snake.io和Minecraft）中的操作行为，收集触摸动态数据，并使用随机森林和K近邻算法进行二分类认证。
AI.result: 最强模型在两个游戏中均实现了约93%的平均准确率，表明触摸动态可以有效区分用户。
AI.conclusion: 触摸动态可以作为连续用户认证的可行方案，本文提供的数据集可供进一步研究使用。

authors_text: Sriram Siva,Maggie Wigness,John G. Rogers,Long Quang,Hao Zhang
title: NAUTS: Negotiation for Adaptation to Unstructured Terrain Surfaces
title_zh: NAUTS：适应非结构​​化地形的谈判
abstract: When robots operate in real-world off-road environments with unstructured terrains, the ability to adapt their navigational policy is critical for effective and safe navigation. However, off-road terrains introduce several challenges to robot navigation, including dynamic obstacles and terrain uncertainty, leading to inefficient traversal or navigation failures. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel approach for adaptation by negotiation that enables a ground robot to adjust its navigational behaviors through a negotiation process. Our approach first learns prediction models for various navigational policies to function as a terrain-aware joint local controller and planner. Then, through a new negotiation process, our approach learns from various policies' interactions with the environment to agree on the optimal combination of policies in an online fashion to adapt robot navigation to unstructured off-road terrains on the fly. Additionally, we implement a new optimization algorithm that offers the optimal solution for robot negotiation in real-time during execution. Experimental results have validated that our method for adaptation by negotiation outperforms previous methods for robot navigation, especially over unseen and uncertain dynamic terrains.
summary: When robots operate in real-world off-road environments with unstructured terrains, the ability to adapt their navigational policy is critical for effective and safe navigation. However, off-road terrains introduce several challenges to robot navigation, including dynamic obstacles and terrain uncertainty, leading to inefficient traversal or navigation failures. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel approach for adaptation by negotiation that enables a ground robot to adjust its navigational behaviors through a negotiation process. Our approach first learns prediction models for various navigational policies to function as a terrain-aware joint local controller and planner. Then, through a new negotiation process, our approach learns from various policies' interactions with the environment to agree on the optimal combination of policies in an online fashion to adapt robot navigation to unstructured off-road terrains on the fly. Additionally, we implement a new optimization algorithm that offers the optimal solution for robot negotiation in real-time during execution. Experimental results have validated that our method for adaptation by negotiation outperforms previous methods for robot navigation, especially over unseen and uncertain dynamic terrains.
abstract_zh: 当机器人在具有非结构化地形的现实越野环境中操作时，调整其导航策略的能力对于有效和安全的导航至关重要。然而，越野地形给机器人导航带来了一些挑战，包括动态障碍物和地形不确定性，导致穿越效率低下或导航失败。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的协商适应方法，使地面机器人能够通过协商过程调整其导航行为。 Our approach first learns prediction models for various navigational policies to function as a terrain-aware joint local controller and planner.然后，通过新的协商过程，我们的方法从各种政策与环境的相互作用中学习，以在线方式就政策的最佳组合达成一致，使机器人导航能够动态适应非结构​​化越野地形。 Additionally, we implement a new optimization algorithm that offers the optimal solution for robot negotiation in real-time during execution.实验结果验证了我们的协商适应方法优于以前的机器人导航方法，特别是在看不见的和不确定的动态地形上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NAUTS方法，通过机器人间的协商机制动态调整导航策略，以适应非结构化地形中的复杂环境。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在动态障碍和地形不确定性下易导致导航失败，需开发实时适应复杂地形的导航策略。
AI.method: 学习预测模型作为地形感知控制器，通过协商过程在线组合多策略，并设计实时优化算法实现动态策略调整。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在未见过的动态地形中显著优于传统导航方法，提升适应性与成功率。
AI.conclusion: 基于协商的适应性导航方法能有效应对非结构化地形挑战，为复杂环境机器人导航提供新思路。

motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在动态障碍和地形不确定性下易导致导航失败，需开发实时适应复杂地形的导航策略。

search_text: NAUTS: Negotiation for Adaptation to Unstructured Terrain Surfaces NAUTS：适应非结构​​化地形的谈判 When robots operate in real-world off-road environments with unstructured terrains, the ability to adapt their navigational policy is critical for effective and safe navigation. However, off-road terrains introduce several challenges to robot navigation, including dynamic obstacles and terrain uncertainty, leading to inefficient traversal or navigation failures. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel approach for adaptation by negotiation that enables a ground robot to adjust its navigational behaviors through a negotiation process. Our approach first learns prediction models for various navigational policies to function as a terrain-aware joint local controller and planner. Then, through a new negotiation process, our approach learns from various policies' interactions with the environment to agree on the optimal combination of policies in an online fashion to adapt robot navigation to unstructured off-road terrains on the fly. Additionally, we implement a new optimization algorithm that offers the optimal solution for robot negotiation in real-time during execution. Experimental results have validated that our method for adaptation by negotiation outperforms previous methods for robot navigation, especially over unseen and uncertain dynamic terrains. 当机器人在具有非结构化地形的现实越野环境中操作时，调整其导航策略的能力对于有效和安全的导航至关重要。然而，越野地形给机器人导航带来了一些挑战，包括动态障碍物和地形不确定性，导致穿越效率低下或导航失败。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的协商适应方法，使地面机器人能够通过协商过程调整其导航行为。 Our approach first learns prediction models for various navigational policies to function as a terrain-aware joint local controller and planner.然后，通过新的协商过程，我们的方法从各种政策与环境的相互作用中学习，以在线方式就政策的最佳组合达成一致，使机器人导航能够动态适应非结构​​化越野地形。 Additionally, we implement a new optimization algorithm that offers the optimal solution for robot negotiation in real-time during execution.实验结果验证了我们的协商适应方法优于以前的机器人导航方法，特别是在看不见的和不确定的动态地形上。 本文提出NAUTS方法，通过机器人间的协商机制动态调整导航策略，以适应非结构化地形中的复杂环境。 Sriram Siva,Maggie Wigness,John G. Rogers,Long Quang,Hao Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Jacob Mallet,Rushit Dave,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala
title: Using Deep Learning to Detecting Deepfakes
title_zh: 使用深度学习来检测 Deepfakes
abstract: In the recent years, social media has grown to become a major source of information for many online users. This has given rise to the spread of misinformation through deepfakes. Deepfakes are videos or images that replace one persons face with another computer-generated face, often a more recognizable person in society. With the recent advances in technology, a person with little technological experience can generate these videos. This enables them to mimic a power figure in society, such as a president or celebrity, creating the potential danger of spreading misinformation and other nefarious uses of deepfakes. To combat this online threat, researchers have developed models that are designed to detect deepfakes. This study looks at various deepfake detection models that use deep learning algorithms to combat this looming threat. This survey focuses on providing a comprehensive overview of the current state of deepfake detection models and the unique approaches many researchers take to solving this problem. The benefits, limitations, and suggestions for future work will be thoroughly discussed throughout this paper.

abstract_zh: 近年来，社交媒体已发展成为许多在线用户的主要信息来源。这导致了通过深度造假传播错误信息。 Deepfakes 是用计算机生成的另一张脸（通常是社会上更容易识别的人）替换一个人脸的视频或图像。随着最近技术的进步，即使技术经验很少的人也可以生成这些视频。这使他们能够模仿社会上的权力人物，例如总统或名人，从而造成传播错误信息和其他恶意使用深度伪造品的潜在危险。为了应对这种在线威胁，研究人员开发了旨在检测​​深度伪造的模型。这项研究着眼于各种使用深度学习算法来对抗这种迫在眉睫的威胁的深度伪造检测模型。这项调查的重点是全面概述深度伪造检测模型的现状以及许多研究人员为解决该问题所采取的独特方法。本文将深入讨论其好处、局限性以及对未来工作的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用深度学习算法检测深度伪造（Deepfakes）的现有模型，分析其方法、优势及局限性。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体的普及，深度伪造技术被滥用于传播虚假信息，威胁社会安全，因此亟需有效的检测方法。
AI.method: 通过调研当前基于深度学习的深度伪造检测模型，总结其技术原理、应用场景及研究不足。
AI.result: 系统梳理了多种检测模型的架构与性能，指出现有方法在准确性、泛化能力及计算效率上的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为深度伪造检测提供了有效手段，但需进一步优化模型鲁棒性并探索跨领域适配方案。

authors_text: M. Yusuf Özkaya,Ümit V. Çatalyürek
title: A Simple and Elegant Mathematical Formulation for the Acyclic DAG Partitioning Problem
title_zh: 非循环 DAG 划分问题的一种简单而优雅的数学公式
abstract: This work addresses the NP-Hard problem of acyclic directed acyclic graph (DAG) partitioning problem. The acyclic partitioning problem is defined as partitioning the vertex set of a given directed acyclic graph into disjoint and collectively exhaustive subsets (parts). Parts are to be assigned such that the total sum of the vertex weights within each part satisfies a common upper bound and the total sum of the edge costs that connect nodes across different parts is minimized. Additionally, the quotient graph, i.e., the induced graph where all nodes that are assigned to the same part are contracted to a single node and edges of those are replaced with cumulative edges towards other nodes, is also a directed acyclic graph. That is, the quotient graph itself is also a graph that contains no cycles. Many computational and real-life applications such as in computational task scheduling, RTL simulations, scheduling of rail-rail transshipment tasks and Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) design make use of acyclic DAG partitioning. We address the need for a simple and elegant mathematical formulation for the acyclic DAG partitioning problem that enables easier understanding, communication, implementation, and experimentation on the problem.
summary: This work addresses the NP-Hard problem of acyclic directed acyclic graph (DAG) partitioning problem. The acyclic partitioning problem is defined as partitioning the vertex set of a given directed acyclic graph into disjoint and collectively exhaustive subsets (parts). Parts are to be assigned such that the total sum of the vertex weights within each part satisfies a common upper bound and the total sum of the edge costs that connect nodes across different parts is minimized. Additionally, the quotient graph, i.e., the induced graph where all nodes that are assigned to the same part are contracted to a single node and edges of those are replaced with cumulative edges towards other nodes, is also a directed acyclic graph. That is, the quotient graph itself is also a graph that contains no cycles. Many computational and real-life applications such as in computational task scheduling, RTL simulations, scheduling of rail-rail transshipment tasks and Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) design make use of acyclic DAG partitioning. We address the need for a simple and elegant mathematical formulation for the acyclic DAG partitioning problem that enables easier understanding, communication, implementation, and experimentation on the problem.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了无环有向无环图 (DAG) 划分问题的 NP 难问题。非循环划分问题被定义为将给定有向非循环图的顶点集划分为不相交且共同详尽的子集（部分）。将分配部分，使得每个部分内的顶点权重的总和满足共同的上限，并且跨不同部分连接节点的边成本的总和最小化。此外，商图，即分配给同一部分的所有节点都收缩为单个节点，并且这些节点的边被朝向其他节点的累积边替换的归纳图，也是有向无环图。也就是说，商图本身也是一个不包含环的图。许多计算和现实生活中的应用，例如计算任务调度、RTL 模拟、铁轨转运任务调度和超大规模集成 (VLSI) 设计，都使用非循环 DAG 分区。我们解决了对非循环 DAG 划分问题的简单而优雅的数学公式的需求，使该问题能够更容易地理解、沟通、实现和实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单优雅的数学公式，用于解决有向无环图（DAG）划分问题，要求划分后的子集满足权重上限且跨子集边成本最小化，同时保持商图无环。
AI.motivation: 现有计算和实际应用（如任务调度、VLSI设计）需要高效处理DAG划分，但缺乏简单且易于实现的数学模型，亟需更优的理论框架支持。
AI.method: 构建数学规划模型，通过定义变量和约束条件，同时满足子集权重限制、边成本最小化及商图无环性质，采用整数规划或相关优化技术实现。
AI.result: 提出新的数学公式，有效解决DAG划分问题，为实际应用提供理论支持，并促进后续算法设计与实验研究。
AI.conclusion: 该公式为DAG划分问题提供了清晰的数学表达，推动相关领域在算法实现与工程应用中的进一步发展。

authors_text: Cagri Kilic,Yu Gu,Jason N. Gross
title: Proprioceptive Slip Detection for Planetary Rovers in Perceptually Degraded Extraterrestrial Environments
title_zh: 感知退化的地外环境中行星漫游车的本体感觉滑动检测
comment: 24 pages, 28 figures. Accepted for publication in Field Robotics
comments: 24 pages, 28 figures. Accepted for publication in Field Robotics
abstract: Slip detection is of fundamental importance for the safety and efficiency of rovers driving on the surface of extraterrestrial bodies. Current planetary rover slip detection systems rely on visual perception on the assumption that sufficient visual features can be acquired in the environment. However, visual-based methods are prone to suffer in perceptually degraded planetary environments with dominant low terrain features such as regolith, glacial terrain, salt-evaporites, and poor lighting conditions such as dark caves and permanently shadowed regions. Relying only on visual sensors for slip detection also requires additional computational power and reduces the rover traversal rate. This paper answers the question of how to detect wheel slippage of a planetary rover without depending on visual perception. In this respect, we propose a slip detection system that obtains its information from a proprioceptive localization framework that is capable of providing reliable, continuous, and computationally efficient state estimation over hundreds of meters. This is accomplished by using zero velocity update, zero angular rate update, and non-holonomic constraints as pseudo-measurement updates on an inertial navigation system framework. The proposed method is evaluated on actual hardware and field-tested in a planetary-analog environment. The method achieves greater than 92% slip detection accuracy for distances around 150 m using only an IMU and wheel encoders.
summary: Slip detection is of fundamental importance for the safety and efficiency of rovers driving on the surface of extraterrestrial bodies. Current planetary rover slip detection systems rely on visual perception on the assumption that sufficient visual features can be acquired in the environment. However, visual-based methods are prone to suffer in perceptually degraded planetary environments with dominant low terrain features such as regolith, glacial terrain, salt-evaporites, and poor lighting conditions such as dark caves and permanently shadowed regions. Relying only on visual sensors for slip detection also requires additional computational power and reduces the rover traversal rate. This paper answers the question of how to detect wheel slippage of a planetary rover without depending on visual perception. In this respect, we propose a slip detection system that obtains its information from a proprioceptive localization framework that is capable of providing reliable, continuous, and computationally efficient state estimation over hundreds of meters. This is accomplished by using zero velocity update, zero angular rate update, and non-holonomic constraints as pseudo-measurement updates on an inertial navigation system framework. The proposed method is evaluated on actual hardware and field-tested in a planetary-analog environment. The method achieves greater than 92% slip detection accuracy for distances around 150 m using only an IMU and wheel encoders.
abstract_zh: Slip detection is of fundamental importance for the safety and efficiency of rovers driving on the surface of extraterrestrial bodies.当前的行星漫游器滑动检测系统依赖于视觉感知，假设可以在环境中获取足够的视觉特征。然而，基于视觉的方法很容易在感知退化的行星环境中受到影响，这些环境具有占主导地位的低地形特征，如风化层、冰川地形、盐蒸发岩，以及昏暗的洞穴和永久阴影区域等不良的照明条件。 Relying only on visual sensors for slip detection also requires additional computational power and reduces the rover traversal rate. This paper answers the question of how to detect wheel slippage of a planetary rover without depending on visual perception.在这方面，我们提出了一种滑动检测系统，该系统从本体感受定位框架获取信息，该框架能够在数百米范围内提供可靠、连续且计算高效的状态估计。这是通过使用零速度更新、零角速率更新和非完整约束作为惯性导航系统框架上的伪测量更新来实现的。 The proposed method is evaluated on actual hardware and field-tested in a planetary-analog environment. The method achieves greater than 92% slip detection accuracy for distances around 150 m using only an IMU and wheel encoders.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种不依赖视觉感知的行星探测车滑移检测方法，适用于视觉退化的外星环境。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉感知滑移检测系统在低特征地形（如月壤、冰川）和光照不足区域（如暗洞）表现不佳，且依赖视觉传感器会增加计算负担并降低行驶效率。
AI.method: 基于本体感觉定位框架，结合零速度更新、零角速度更新和非完整约束作为惯性导航系统的伪测量更新，仅使用IMU和轮编码器实现滑移检测。
AI.result: 在行星模拟环境中，该方法通过实际硬件测试达到约150米距离下92%以上的滑移检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉定位方法为视觉退化环境下的行星探测车提供了可靠、高效的滑移检测解决方案，可提升任务安全性和自主性。

authors_text: Jon E. Froehlich,Michael Saugstad,Manaswi Saha,Matthew Johnson
title: Towards Mapping and Assessing Sidewalk Accessibility Across Sociocultural and Geographic Contexts
title_zh: 跨社会文化和地理背景绘制和评估人行道的可达性
comment: Workshop paper at the Data4Good workshop hosted as part of AVI2020. See https://sites.google.com/view/data4good/program
comments: Workshop paper at the Data4Good workshop hosted as part of AVI2020. See https://sites.google.com/view/data4good/program
abstract: Despite the important role of sidewalks in supporting mobility, accessibility, and public health, there is a lack of high-quality datasets and corresponding analyses on sidewalk existence and condition. Our work explores a twofold vision: first, to develop scalable mechanisms to locate and assess sidewalks in cities across the world, and second, to use this data to support new urban analyses and mobility tools. We report on two preliminary urban science explorations enabled by our approach: exploring geo-spatial patterns and key correlates of sidewalk accessibility and examining differences in sidewalk infrastructure across regions.
summary: Despite the important role of sidewalks in supporting mobility, accessibility, and public health, there is a lack of high-quality datasets and corresponding analyses on sidewalk existence and condition. Our work explores a twofold vision: first, to develop scalable mechanisms to locate and assess sidewalks in cities across the world, and second, to use this data to support new urban analyses and mobility tools. We report on two preliminary urban science explorations enabled by our approach: exploring geo-spatial patterns and key correlates of sidewalk accessibility and examining differences in sidewalk infrastructure across regions.
abstract_zh: 尽管人行道在支持流动性、可达性和公共卫生方面发挥着重要作用，但缺乏关于人行道存在和状况的高质量数据集和相应分析。我们的工作探索了双重愿景：首先，开发可扩展的机制来定位和评估世界各地城市的人行道，其次，使用这些数据来支持新的城市分析和出行工具。我们报告了通过我们的方法实现的两项初步城市科学探索：探索地理空间模式和人行道可达性的关键相关性，以及研究不同地区人行道基础设施的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发可扩展的方法以全球城市中定位和评估人行道，并利用该数据支持城市分析和移动工具。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏高质量的人行道存在与状况数据，限制了城市规划和公共健康研究，需建立普适性评估机制。
AI.method: 通过地理空间分析技术与数据采集方法，结合多地区案例进行对比研究，探索人行道可达性的空间模式及影响因素。
AI.result: 识别出人行道可达性的地理分布规律及其与社会经济因素的关联，揭示不同区域间基础设施的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法为城市交通研究提供新视角，未来需进一步验证方法普适性并扩大数据覆盖范围。

authors_text: Andrew Lauziere,Ryan Christensen,Hari Shroff
title: A Semi-automatic Cell Tracking Process Towards Completing the 4D Atlas of C. elegans Development
title_zh: 完成线虫 4D 图谱开发的半自动细胞追踪过程
abstract: The nematode Caenorhabditis elegans (C. elegans) is used as a model organism to better understand developmental biology and neurobiology. C. elegans features an invariant cell lineage, which has been catalogued and observed using fluorescence microscopy images. However, established methods to track cells in late-stage development fail to generalize once sporadic muscular twitching has begun. We build upon methodology which uses skin cells as fiducial markers to carry out cell tracking despite random twitching. In particular, we present a cell nucleus segmentation and tracking procedure which was integrated into a 3D rendering GUI to improve efficiency in tracking cells across late-stage development. Results on images depicting aforementioned muscle cell nuclei across three test embryos suggest the fiducial markers in conjunction with a classic tracking paradigm overcome sporadic twitching.
summary: The nematode Caenorhabditis elegans (C. elegans) is used as a model organism to better understand developmental biology and neurobiology. C. elegans features an invariant cell lineage, which has been catalogued and observed using fluorescence microscopy images. However, established methods to track cells in late-stage development fail to generalize once sporadic muscular twitching has begun. We build upon methodology which uses skin cells as fiducial markers to carry out cell tracking despite random twitching. In particular, we present a cell nucleus segmentation and tracking procedure which was integrated into a 3D rendering GUI to improve efficiency in tracking cells across late-stage development. Results on images depicting aforementioned muscle cell nuclei across three test embryos suggest the fiducial markers in conjunction with a classic tracking paradigm overcome sporadic twitching.
abstract_zh: 线虫秀丽隐杆线虫（C. elegans）被用作模型生物，以更好地了解发育生物学和神经生物学。线虫具有不变的细胞谱系，已使用荧光显微镜图像对其进行编目和观察。然而，一旦零星的肌肉抽搐开始，追踪晚期发育细胞的既定方法就无法推广。我们建立的方法论使用皮肤细胞作为基准标记来进行细胞跟踪，尽管随机抽搐。特别是，我们提出了一种细胞核分割和跟踪程序，该程序被集成到 3D 渲染 GUI 中，以提高后期开发跟踪细胞的效率。描述三个测试胚胎中上述肌肉细胞核的图像结果表明，基准标记与经典跟踪范例相结合克服了偶发性抽搐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半自动细胞追踪方法，用于构建C. elegans发育的4D图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在C. elegans发育后期因肌肉抽搐导致细胞追踪失效，阻碍了4D图谱的完成。
AI.method: 利用皮肤细胞作为标记物结合经典追踪范式，并集成3D渲染GUI提升追踪效率。
AI.result: 在三个测试胚胎的图像中，该方法有效克服了肌肉抽搐对追踪的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了发育后期细胞追踪难题，为构建完整4D图谱提供了技术支撑。

Results on images depicting aforementioned muscle cell nuclei across three test embryos suggest the fiducial markers in conjunction with a classic tracking paradigm overcome sporadic twitching. 线虫秀丽隐杆线虫（C. elegans）被用作模型生物，以更好地了解发育生物学和神经生物学。线虫具有不变的细胞谱系，已使用荧光显微镜图像对其进行编目和观察。然而，一旦零星的肌肉抽搐开始，追踪晚期发育细胞的既定方法就无法推广。我们建立的方法论使用皮肤细胞作为基准标记来进行细胞跟踪，尽管随机抽搐。特别是，我们提出了一种细胞核分割和跟踪程序，该程序被集成到 3D 渲染 GUI 中，以提高后期开发跟踪细胞的效率。描述三个测试胚胎中上述肌肉细胞核的图像结果表明，基准标记与经典跟踪范例相结合克服了偶发性抽搐。 本文提出一种半自动细胞追踪方法，用于构建C. elegans发育的4D图谱。 Andrew Lauziere,Ryan Christensen,Hari Shroff cs.CV

authors_text: Linjie Lyu,Ayush Tewari,Thomas Leimkuehler,Marc Habermann,Christian Theobalt
title: Neural Radiance Transfer Fields for Relightable Novel-view Synthesis with Global Illumination
title_zh: 用于具有全局照明的可重新照明的新颖视图合成的神经辐射传输场
abstract: Given a set of images of a scene, the re-rendering of this scene from novel views and lighting conditions is an important and challenging problem in Computer Vision and Graphics. On the one hand, most existing works in Computer Vision usually impose many assumptions regarding the image formation process, e.g. direct illumination and predefined materials, to make scene parameter estimation tractable. On the other hand, mature Computer Graphics tools allow modeling of complex photo-realistic light transport given all the scene parameters. Combining these approaches, we propose a method for scene relighting under novel views by learning a neural precomputed radiance transfer function, which implicitly handles global illumination effects using novel environment maps. Our method can be solely supervised on a set of real images of the scene under a single unknown lighting condition. To disambiguate the task during training, we tightly integrate a differentiable path tracer in the training process and propose a combination of a synthesized OLAT and a real image loss. Results show that the recovered disentanglement of scene parameters improves significantly over the current state of the art and, thus, also our re-rendering results are more realistic and accurate.
summary: Given a set of images of a scene, the re-rendering of this scene from novel views and lighting conditions is an important and challenging problem in Computer Vision and Graphics. On the one hand, most existing works in Computer Vision usually impose many assumptions regarding the image formation process, e.g. direct illumination and predefined materials, to make scene parameter estimation tractable. On the other hand, mature Computer Graphics tools allow modeling of complex photo-realistic light transport given all the scene parameters. Combining these approaches, we propose a method for scene relighting under novel views by learning a neural precomputed radiance transfer function, which implicitly handles global illumination effects using novel environment maps. Our method can be solely supervised on a set of real images of the scene under a single unknown lighting condition. To disambiguate the task during training, we tightly integrate a differentiable path tracer in the training process and propose a combination of a synthesized OLAT and a real image loss. Results show that the recovered disentanglement of scene parameters improves significantly over the current state of the art and, thus, also our re-rendering results are more realistic and accurate.
abstract_zh: 给定场景的一组图像，从新颖的视图和照明条件重新渲染该场景是计算机视觉和图形学中的一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。一方面，计算机视觉领域的大多数现有工作通常对图像形成过程施加许多假设，例如直接照明和预定义材质，使场景参数估计变得易于处理。另一方面，成熟的计算机图形工具允许在给定所有场景参数的情况下对复杂的照片级真实感光传输进行建模。结合这些方法，我们提出了一种通过学习神经预计算的辐射传递函数在新视图下进行场景重新照明的方法，该函数使用新的环境图隐式处理全局照明效果。我们的方法可以在单一未知照明条件下对场景的一组真实图像进行单独监督。为了消除训练过程中任务的歧义，我们在训练过程中紧密集成了可微路径追踪器，并提出了合成 OLAT 和真实图像损失的组合。结果表明，恢复后的场景参数解缠度比当前技术水平显着提高，因此，我们的重新渲染结果也更加真实和准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经辐射传输场的方法，实现具有全局光照效果的可重新照明新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉方法依赖图像形成假设导致效果受限，而图形学工具需完整场景参数。本文旨在结合两者优势，实现更真实的场景重照明与新视角合成。
AI.method: 学习神经预计算辐射传输函数，利用环境贴图隐式处理全局光照，通过可微分路径追踪器结合合成OLAT与真实图像损失进行训练。
AI.result: 场景参数解耦效果显著优于现有方法，重新渲染结果在真实感和准确性上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合计算机视觉与图形学技术，为复杂光照条件下的场景重照明提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tong Yang,Li Huang,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Efficient Search of the k Shortest Non-Homotopic Paths by Eliminating Non-k-Optimal Topologies
title_zh: 通过消除非 k 最优拓扑有效搜索 k 最短非同伦路径
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: An efficient algorithm to solve the $k$ shortest non-homotopic path planning ($k$-SNPP) problem in a 2D environment is proposed in this paper. Motivated by accelerating the inefficient exploration of the homotopy-augmented space of the 2D environment, our fundamental idea is to identify the non-$k$-optimal path topologies as early as possible and terminate the pathfinding along them. This is a non-trivial practice because it has to be done at an intermediate state of the path planning process when locally shortest paths have not been fully constructed. In other words, the paths to be compared have not rendezvoused at the goal location, which makes the homotopy theory, modelling the spatial relationship among the paths having the same endpoint, not applicable. This paper is the first work that develops a systematic distance-based topology simplification mechanism to solve the $k$-SNPP task, whose core contribution is to assert the distance-based order of non-homotopic locally shortest paths before constructing them. If the order can be predicted, then those path topologies having more than $k$ better topologies are proven free of the desired $k$ paths and thus can be safely discarded during the path planning process. To this end, a hierarchical topological tree is proposed as an implementation of the mechanism, whose nodes are proven to expand in non-homotopic directions and edges (collision-free path segments) are proven locally shortest. With efficient criteria that observe the order relations between partly constructed locally shortest paths being imparted into the tree, the tree nodes that expand in non-$k$-optimal topologies will not be expanded. As a result, the computational time for solving the $k$-SNPP problem is reduced by near two orders of magnitude.

Motivated by accelerating the inefficient exploration of the homotopy-augmented space of the 2D environment, our fundamental idea is to identify the non-$k$-optimal path topologies as early as possible and terminate the pathfinding along them. In other words, the paths to be compared have not rendezvoused at the goal location, which makes the homotopy theory, modelling the spatial relationship among the paths having the same endpoint, not applicable. This paper is the first work that develops a systematic distance-based topology simplification mechanism to solve the $k$-SNPP task, whose core contribution is to assert the distance-based order of non-homotopic locally shortest paths before constructing them. If the order can be predicted, then those path topologies having more than $k$ better topologies are proven free of the desired $k$ paths and thus can be safely discarded during the path planning process. To this end, a hierarchical topological tree is proposed as an implementation of the mechanism, whose nodes are proven to expand in non-homotopic directions and edges (collision-free path segments) are proven locally shortest. With efficient criteria that observe the order relations between partly constructed locally shortest paths being imparted into the tree, the tree nodes that expand in non-$k$-optimal topologies will not be expanded. As a result, the computational time for solving the $k$-SNPP problem is reduced by near two orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种解决二维环境中$k$最短非同伦路径规划（$k$-SNPP）问题的有效算法。出于加速二维环境同伦增强空间的低效探索的动机，我们的基本思想是尽早识别非 $k$ 最优路径拓扑并终止沿着它们的寻路。这是一个重要的实践，因为它必须在路径规划过程的中间状态下完成，此时局部最短路径尚未完全构建。换句话说，要比较的路径尚未在目标位置交汇，这使得模拟具有相同端点的路径之间的空间关系的同伦理论不适用。本文是第一篇开发系统的基于距离的拓扑简化机制来解决 $k$-SNPP 任务的工作，其核心贡献是在构造非同伦局部最短路径之前断言基于距离的顺序。如果可以预测顺序，则证明具有超过 $k$ 更好拓扑的那些路径拓扑不包含所需的 $k$ 路径，因此可以在路径规划过程中安全地丢弃。为此，提出了一种分层拓扑树作为该机制的实现，其节点被证明可以在非同伦方向上扩展，并且边缘（无碰撞路径段）被证明是局部最短的。通过观察部分构造的局部最短路径之间的顺序关系的有效标准被传递到树中，在非$k$最优拓扑中扩展的树节点将不会被扩展。结果，解决 $k$-SNPP 问题的计算时间减少了近两个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效算法，用于在二维环境中解决k条最短非同伦路径规划（k-SNPP）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在探索同伦增强空间时效率低下，需提前识别并终止非k最优路径拓扑的搜索。
AI.method: 构建分层拓扑树，通过距离基准的拓扑简化机制，在局部最短路径未完全构建时预测其顺序并剪枝非k最优拓扑。
AI.result: 计算时间减少近两个数量级，首次实现系统化的距离基准拓扑简化机制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过早期剪枝非k最优路径拓扑，显著提升了k-SNPP问题的求解效率。

authors_text: Yiheng Zhang,Ting Yao,Zhaofan Qiu,Tao Mei
title: Lightweight and Progressively-Scalable Networks for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的轻量级且可渐进扩展的网络
abstract: Multi-scale learning frameworks have been regarded as a capable class of models to boost semantic segmentation. The problem nevertheless is not trivial especially for the real-world deployments, which often demand high efficiency in inference latency. In this paper, we thoroughly analyze the design of convolutional blocks (the type of convolutions and the number of channels in convolutions), and the ways of interactions across multiple scales, all from lightweight standpoint for semantic segmentation. With such in-depth comparisons, we conclude three principles, and accordingly devise Lightweight and Progressively-Scalable Networks (LPS-Net) that novelly expands the network complexity in a greedy manner. Technically, LPS-Net first capitalizes on the principles to build a tiny network. Then, LPS-Net progressively scales the tiny network to larger ones by expanding a single dimension (the number of convolutional blocks, the number of channels, or the input resolution) at one time to meet the best speed/accuracy tradeoff. Extensive experiments conducted on three datasets consistently demonstrate the superiority of LPS-Net over several efficient semantic segmentation methods. More remarkably, our LPS-Net achieves 73.4% mIoU on Cityscapes test set, with the speed of 413.5FPS on an NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti, leading to a performance improvement by 1.5% and a 65% speed-up against the state-of-the-art STDC. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/YihengZhang-CV/LPS-Net}.
summary: Multi-scale learning frameworks have been regarded as a capable class of models to boost semantic segmentation. The problem nevertheless is not trivial especially for the real-world deployments, which often demand high efficiency in inference latency. In this paper, we thoroughly analyze the design of convolutional blocks (the type of convolutions and the number of channels in convolutions), and the ways of interactions across multiple scales, all from lightweight standpoint for semantic segmentation. With such in-depth comparisons, we conclude three principles, and accordingly devise Lightweight and Progressively-Scalable Networks (LPS-Net) that novelly expands the network complexity in a greedy manner. Technically, LPS-Net first capitalizes on the principles to build a tiny network. Then, LPS-Net progressively scales the tiny network to larger ones by expanding a single dimension (the number of convolutional blocks, the number of channels, or the input resolution) at one time to meet the best speed/accuracy tradeoff. Extensive experiments conducted on three datasets consistently demonstrate the superiority of LPS-Net over several efficient semantic segmentation methods. More remarkably, our LPS-Net achieves 73.4% mIoU on Cityscapes test set, with the speed of 413.5FPS on an NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti, leading to a performance improvement by 1.5% and a 65% speed-up against the state-of-the-art STDC. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/YihengZhang-CV/LPS-Net}.
abstract_zh: 多尺度学习框架被认为是一类能够促进语义分割的模型。然而，这个问题并不是微不足道的，特别是对于现实世界的部署来说，这通常需要高效率的推理延迟。在本文中，我们从语义分割的轻量级角度全面分析了卷积块的设计（卷积的类型和卷积中的通道数）以及跨多个尺度的交互方式。通过如此深入的比较，我们总结出三个原则，并相应地设计了轻量级渐进可扩展网络（LPS-Net），它以贪婪的方式新颖地扩展了网络复杂性。从技术上讲，LPS-Net 首先利用这些原理来构建一个微型网络。然后，LPS-Net 通过一次性扩展单个维度（卷积块的数量、通道的数量或输入分辨率）来逐步将小型网络扩展到更大的网络，以满足最佳速度/精度权衡。在三个数据集上进行的大量实验一致证明了 LPS-Net 相对于几种有效的语义分割方法的优越性。更值得注意的是，我们的 LPS-Net 在 Cityscapes 测试集上实现了 73.4% mIoU，在 NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti 上速度达到 413.5FPS，与最先进的 STDC 相比，性能提高了 1.5%，速度提高了 65%。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/YihengZhang-CV/LPS-Net} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量且可逐步扩展的网络（LPS-Net），用于语义分割任务，以在保持高精度的同时提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 多尺度学习框架虽能提升语义分割性能，但实际部署中面临推理延迟高与效率低的矛盾，亟需从轻量化角度优化网络设计。
AI.method: 通过深入分析卷积块设计及多尺度交互方式，提出三原则并构建LPS-Net。该网络从极简结构出发，逐步单维度扩展（卷积块数量、通道数或输入分辨率），实现速度与精度的最优平衡。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上达到73.4% mIoU与413.5 FPS，相较STDC模型提升1.5%精度并加速65%。
AI.conclusion: LPS-Net通过轻量化设计与渐进式扩展策略，在语义分割任务中实现了高效能与高精度的统一，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lukas Hermann,Max Argus,Adrian Roefer,Abhinav Valada,Thomas Brox
title: RobotIO: A Python Library for Robot Manipulation Experiments
title_zh: RobotIO：用于机器人操作实验的 Python 库
abstract: Setting up robot environments to quickly test newly developed algorithms is still a difficult and time consuming process. This presents a significant hurdle to researchers interested in performing real-world robotic experiments. RobotIO is a python library designed to solve this problem. It focuses on providing common, simple, and well structured python interfaces for robots, grippers, and cameras, etc. These are provided with implementations of these interfaces for common hardware. This enables code using RobotIO to be portable across different robot setups. In terms of architecture, RobotIO is designed to be compatible with OpenAI gym environments, as well as ROS; examples of both of these are provided. The library comes together with a number of helpful tools, such as camera calibration scripts and episode recording functionality that further support algorithm development.
summary: Setting up robot environments to quickly test newly developed algorithms is still a difficult and time consuming process. This presents a significant hurdle to researchers interested in performing real-world robotic experiments. RobotIO is a python library designed to solve this problem. It focuses on providing common, simple, and well structured python interfaces for robots, grippers, and cameras, etc. These are provided with implementations of these interfaces for common hardware. This enables code using RobotIO to be portable across different robot setups. In terms of architecture, RobotIO is designed to be compatible with OpenAI gym environments, as well as ROS; examples of both of these are provided. The library comes together with a number of helpful tools, such as camera calibration scripts and episode recording functionality that further support algorithm development.
abstract_zh: 设置机器人环境来快速测试新开发的算法仍然是一个困难且耗时的过程。这给有兴趣进行现实世界机器人实验的研究人员带来了重大障碍。 RobotIO是一个旨在解决这个问题的Python库。它专注于为机器人、夹具和相机等提供通用、简单且结构良好的Python接口。这些接口都提供了针对通用硬件的这些接口的实现。这使得使用 RobotIO 的代码可以在不同的机器人设置之间移植。在架构方面，RobotIO 被设计为兼容 OpenAI 健身房环境，以及 ROS；提供了这两者的示例。该库附带了许多有用的工具，例如进一步支持算法开发的相机校准脚本和剧集录制功能。

AI.tldr: 开发RobotIO库以简化机器人操作实验环境的搭建，提供标准化接口和跨平台兼容性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人实验环境设置复杂且耗时，限制了算法的快速测试与实际应用研究。
AI.method: 设计Python库提供机器人、夹爪、相机等硬件的通用接口，并兼容OpenAI gym和ROS框架，附带校准及记录工具。
AI.result: 实现跨硬件平台的代码可移植性，支持主流框架集成，提升算法开发效率与实验可重复性。
AI.conclusion: RobotIO通过统一接口与兼容性设计，有效降低机器人实验门槛，推动算法研究与实际应用的结合。

authors_text: Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli,Jonathan Lorand,Gioele Zardini
title: Categorification of Negative Information using Enrichment
title_zh: 使用丰富对负面信息进行分类
abstract: In many engineering applications it is useful to reason about "negative information". For example, in planning problems, providing an optimal solution is the same as giving a feasible solution (the "positive" information) together with a proof of the fact that there cannot be feasible solutions better than the one given (the "negative" information). We model negative information by introducing the concept of "norphisms", as opposed to the positive information of morphisms. A "nategory" is a category that has "nom"-sets in addition to hom-sets, and specifies the interaction between norphisms and morphisms. In particular, we have composition rules of the form morphism + norphism $\to$ norphism. Norphisms do not compose by themselves; rather, they use morphisms as catalysts. After providing several applied examples, we connect nategories to enriched category theory. Specifically, we prove that categories enriched in de Paiva's dialectica categories GC, in the case C = Set and equipped with a modified monoidal product, define nategories which satisfy additional regularity properties. This formalizes negative information categorically in a way that makes negative and positive morphisms equal citizens.
summary: In many engineering applications it is useful to reason about "negative information". For example, in planning problems, providing an optimal solution is the same as giving a feasible solution (the "positive" information) together with a proof of the fact that there cannot be feasible solutions better than the one given (the "negative" information). We model negative information by introducing the concept of "norphisms", as opposed to the positive information of morphisms. A "nategory" is a category that has "nom"-sets in addition to hom-sets, and specifies the interaction between norphisms and morphisms. In particular, we have composition rules of the form morphism + norphism $\to$ norphism. Norphisms do not compose by themselves; rather, they use morphisms as catalysts. After providing several applied examples, we connect nategories to enriched category theory. Specifically, we prove that categories enriched in de Paiva's dialectica categories GC, in the case C = Set and equipped with a modified monoidal product, define nategories which satisfy additional regularity properties. This formalizes negative information categorically in a way that makes negative and positive morphisms equal citizens.
abstract_zh: 在许多工程应用中，推理“负面信息”很有用。例如，在规划问题中，提供最佳解决方案与给出可行解决方案（“正”信息）以及证明不可能存在比给定解决方案（“负”信息）更好的可行解决方案这一事实相同。我们通过引入“态射”的概念来对负信息进行建模，这与态射的正信息相反。 “类别”是除了 hom 集之外还具有“nom”集的类别，并指定诺菲射和态射之间的相互作用。特别是，我们有形射 + 范射 $\to$ 范射形式的组合规则。诺菲主义本身并不构成；相反，他们使用态射作为催化剂。在提供了几个应用示例之后，我们将类别与丰富范畴论联系起来。具体来说，我们证明在 de Paiva 辩证法类别 GC 中丰富的类别，在 C = Set 的情况下并配备修改的幺半群积，定义了满足附加正则性质的类别。这以一种使消极态射和积极态射平等的方式将消极信息形式化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将负信息形式化的范畴论方法，通过引入'norphisms'和'nategory'的概念，构建了一个能够处理正信息与负信息的数学框架。
AI.motivation: 在许多工程应用中，除了正信息（如可行解）外，还需要处理负信息（如证明不存在更优解）。传统范畴论难以有效表达负信息，因此需要一种新的数学工具。
AI.method: 通过引入'norphisms'和'nategory'的概念，构建包含正信息和负信息交互规则的范畴结构，并将其与富化范畴论结合，特别地，利用de Paiva的dialectica范畴GC进行形式化。
AI.result: 证明了在特定条件下，富化于dialectica范畴GC的范畴可以定义满足额外正则性质的nategory，从而形式化地将负信息纳入范畴论框架。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过nategory和norphisms的引入，为负信息提供了范畴论层面的形式化方法，使正信息与负信息在数学结构中具有同等地位。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种将负信息形式化的范畴论方法，通过引入'norphisms'和'nategory'的概念，构建了一个能够处理正信息与负信息的数学框架。
ai_content.motivation: 在许多工程应用中，除了正信息（如可行解）外，还需要处理负信息（如证明不存在更优解）。传统范畴论难以有效表达负信息，因此需要一种新的数学工具。
ai_content.method: 通过引入'norphisms'和'nategory'的概念，构建包含正信息和负信息交互规则的范畴结构，并将其与富化范畴论结合，特别地，利用de Paiva的dialectica范畴GC进行形式化。
ai_content.result: 证明了在特定条件下，富化于dialectica范畴GC的范畴可以定义满足额外正则性质的nategory，从而形式化地将负信息纳入范畴论框架。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文通过nategory和norphisms的引入，为负信息提供了范畴论层面的形式化方法，使正信息与负信息在数学结构中具有同等地位。

search_text: Categorification of Negative Information using Enrichment 使用丰富对负面信息进行分类 In many engineering applications it is useful to reason about "negative information". For example, in planning problems, providing an optimal solution is the same as giving a feasible solution (the "positive" information) together with a proof of the fact that there cannot be feasible solutions better than the one given (the "negative" information). We model negative information by introducing the concept of "norphisms", as opposed to the positive information of morphisms. A "nategory" is a category that has "nom"-sets in addition to hom-sets, and specifies the interaction between norphisms and morphisms. In particular, we have composition rules of the form morphism + norphism $\to$ norphism. Norphisms do not compose by themselves; rather, they use morphisms as catalysts. After providing several applied examples, we connect nategories to enriched category theory. Specifically, we prove that categories enriched in de Paiva's dialectica categories GC, in the case C = Set and equipped with a modified monoidal product, define nategories which satisfy additional regularity properties. This formalizes negative information categorically in a way that makes negative and positive morphisms equal citizens. 在许多工程应用中，推理“负面信息”很有用。例如，在规划问题中，提供最佳解决方案与给出可行解决方案（“正”信息）以及证明不可能存在比给定解决方案（“负”信息）更好的可行解决方案这一事实相同。我们通过引入“态射”的概念来对负信息进行建模，这与态射的正信息相反。 “类别”是除了 hom 集之外还具有“nom”集的类别，并指定诺菲射和态射之间的相互作用。特别是，我们有形射 + 范射 $\to$ 范射形式的组合规则。诺菲主义本身并不构成；相反，他们使用态射作为催化剂。在提供了几个应用示例之后，我们将类别与丰富范畴论联系起来。具体来说，我们证明在 de Paiva 辩证法类别 GC 中丰富的类别，在 C = Set 的情况下并配备修改的幺半群积，定义了满足附加正则性质的类别。这以一种使消极态射和积极态射平等的方式将消极信息形式化。 本文提出了一种将负信息形式化的范畴论方法，通过引入'norphisms'和'nategory'的概念，构建了一个能够处理正信息与负信息的数学框架。 Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli,Jonathan Lorand,Gioele Zardini math.CT,cs.RO

authors_text: Rakesh John Amala Arokia Nathan,Indrajit Kurmi,Oliver Bimber
title: Inverse Airborne Optical Sectioning
title_zh: 逆机载光学切片
abstract: We present Inverse Airborne Optical Sectioning (IAOS) an optical analogy to Inverse Synthetic Aperture Radar (ISAR). Moving targets, such as walking people, that are heavily occluded by vegetation can be made visible and tracked with a stationary optical sensor (e.g., a hovering camera drone above forest). We introduce the principles of IAOS (i.e., inverse synthetic aperture imaging), explain how the signal of occluders can be further suppressed by filtering the Radon transform of the image integral, and present how targets motion parameters can be estimated manually and automatically. Finally, we show that while tracking occluded targets in conventional aerial images is infeasible, it becomes efficiently possible in integral images that result from IAOS.
summary: We present Inverse Airborne Optical Sectioning (IAOS) an optical analogy to Inverse Synthetic Aperture Radar (ISAR). Moving targets, such as walking people, that are heavily occluded by vegetation can be made visible and tracked with a stationary optical sensor (e.g., a hovering camera drone above forest). We introduce the principles of IAOS (i.e., inverse synthetic aperture imaging), explain how the signal of occluders can be further suppressed by filtering the Radon transform of the image integral, and present how targets motion parameters can be estimated manually and automatically. Finally, we show that while tracking occluded targets in conventional aerial images is infeasible, it becomes efficiently possible in integral images that result from IAOS.
abstract_zh: 我们提出逆机载光学切片（IAOS），它是逆合成孔径雷达（ISAR）的光学类比。被植被严重遮挡的移动目标（例如行走的人）可以通过固定光学传感器（例如，森林上方悬停的摄像无人机）变得可见并进行跟踪。我们介绍了IAOS（即逆合成孔径成像）的原理，解释了如何通过对图像积分的Radon变换进行滤波来进一步抑制遮挡物的信号，并介绍了如何手动和自动估计目标运动参数。最后，我们表明，虽然在传统航空图像中跟踪被遮挡的目标是不可行的，但在 IAOS 生成的积分图像中，它变得有效。

AI.tldr: 提出逆空载光学分层技术（IAOS），利用积分图像有效追踪植被遮挡下的移动目标。
AI.motivation: 传统航空图像难以追踪植被遮挡下的移动目标，需开发新方法提高可见性与追踪效率。
AI.method: 基于逆合成孔径成像原理，通过滤波Radon变换抑制遮挡物信号，并结合手动与自动方法估计目标运动参数。
AI.result: 在积分图像中成功实现对遮挡目标的高效追踪，而传统航拍图像无法做到。
AI.conclusion: IAOS通过积分图像有效解决植被遮挡下的目标追踪难题，验证了其在复杂环境中的可行性。

authors_text: Dexun Li,Pradeep Varakantham
title: Towards Soft Fairness in Restless Multi-Armed Bandits
title_zh: 在不安分的多臂强盗中走向软公平
abstract: Restless multi-armed bandits (RMAB) is a framework for allocating limited resources under uncertainty. It is an extremely useful model for monitoring beneficiaries and executing timely interventions to ensure maximum benefit in public health settings (e.g., ensuring patients take medicines in tuberculosis settings, ensuring pregnant mothers listen to automated calls about good pregnancy practices). Due to the limited resources, typically certain communities or regions are starved of interventions that can have follow-on effects. To avoid starvation in the executed interventions across individuals/regions/communities, we first provide a soft fairness constraint and then provide an approach to enforce the soft fairness constraint in RMABs. The soft fairness constraint requires that an algorithm never probabilistically favor one arm over another if the long-term cumulative reward of choosing the latter arm is higher. Our approach incorporates softmax based value iteration method in the RMAB setting to design selection algorithms that manage to satisfy the proposed fairness constraint. Our method, referred to as SoftFair, also provides theoretical performance guarantees and is asymptotically optimal. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of our approaches on simulated benchmarks and show that the soft fairness constraint can be handled without a significant sacrifice on value.
summary: Restless multi-armed bandits (RMAB) is a framework for allocating limited resources under uncertainty. It is an extremely useful model for monitoring beneficiaries and executing timely interventions to ensure maximum benefit in public health settings (e.g., ensuring patients take medicines in tuberculosis settings, ensuring pregnant mothers listen to automated calls about good pregnancy practices). Due to the limited resources, typically certain communities or regions are starved of interventions that can have follow-on effects. To avoid starvation in the executed interventions across individuals/regions/communities, we first provide a soft fairness constraint and then provide an approach to enforce the soft fairness constraint in RMABs. The soft fairness constraint requires that an algorithm never probabilistically favor one arm over another if the long-term cumulative reward of choosing the latter arm is higher. Our approach incorporates softmax based value iteration method in the RMAB setting to design selection algorithms that manage to satisfy the proposed fairness constraint. Our method, referred to as SoftFair, also provides theoretical performance guarantees and is asymptotically optimal. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of our approaches on simulated benchmarks and show that the soft fairness constraint can be handled without a significant sacrifice on value.
abstract_zh: 不安的多臂老虎机（RMAB）是一个在不确定性下分配有限资源的框架。这是一个非常有用的模型，可用于监测受益人并及时执行干预措施，以确保公共卫生环境中的最大利益（例如，确保患者在结核病环境中服药，确保怀孕母亲听取有关良好怀孕习惯的自动呼叫）。由于资源有限，某些社区或地区通常缺乏能够产生后续影响的干预措施。为了避免跨个人/地区/社区执行的干预措施出现饥饿，我们首先提供软公平约束，然后提供一种在 RMAB 中强制执行软公平约束的方法。软公平约束要求，如果选择后一臂的长期累积奖励较高，则算法永远不会在概率上偏向另一臂。我们的方法在 RMAB 设置中结合了基于 softmax 的值迭代方法来设计能够满足所提出的公平性约束的选择算法。我们的方法称为 SoftFair，也提供了理论性能保证并且是渐近最优的。最后，我们在模拟基准上展示了我们的方法的实用性，并表明可以在不显着牺牲价值的情况下处理软公平约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种软公平约束机制，用于解决Restless多臂老虎机（RMAB）框架中资源分配不均的问题，并设计SoftFair算法实现公平性与性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 在公共健康等场景中，有限资源分配可能导致部分群体长期得不到干预，影响整体效益。传统RMAB方法缺乏对公平性的约束，需设计兼顾公平与效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于softmax值迭代法，提出SoftFair算法，在RMAB中引入软公平约束：当某臂长期累计奖励更高时，算法不概率性偏好其他臂，通过理论分析保证渐进最优性。
AI.result: 在模拟基准测试中，SoftFair方法有效满足软公平约束，且未显著牺牲系统总价值，验证了方法的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: SoftFair算法为RMAB框架提供了理论支持的公平性保障，在公共健康等资源敏感场景中具有实际应用价值。

Our approach incorporates softmax based value iteration method in the RMAB setting to design selection algorithms that manage to satisfy the proposed fairness constraint. Our method, referred to as SoftFair, also provides theoretical performance guarantees and is asymptotically optimal. Finally, we demonstrate the utility of our approaches on simulated benchmarks and show that the soft fairness constraint can be handled without a significant sacrifice on value. 不安的多臂老虎机（RMAB）是一个在不确定性下分配有限资源的框架。这是一个非常有用的模型，可用于监测受益人并及时执行干预措施，以确保公共卫生环境中的最大利益（例如，确保患者在结核病环境中服药，确保怀孕母亲听取有关良好怀孕习惯的自动呼叫）。由于资源有限，某些社区或地区通常缺乏能够产生后续影响的干预措施。为了避免跨个人/地区/社区执行的干预措施出现饥饿，我们首先提供软公平约束，然后提供一种在 RMAB 中强制执行软公平约束的方法。软公平约束要求，如果选择后一臂的长期累积奖励较高，则算法永远不会在概率上偏向另一臂。我们的方法在 RMAB 设置中结合了基于 softmax 的值迭代方法来设计能够满足所提出的公平性约束的选择算法。我们的方法称为 SoftFair，也提供了理论性能保证并且是渐近最优的。最后，我们在模拟基准上展示了我们的方法的实用性，并表明可以在不显着牺牲价值的情况下处理软公平约束。 本文提出一种软公平约束机制，用于解决Restless多臂老虎机（RMAB）框架中资源分配不均的问题，并设计SoftFair算法实现公平性与性能的平衡。 Dexun Li,Pradeep Varakantham cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Kwonyoung Kim,Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Dongbo Min,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: PointFix: Learning to Fix Domain Bias for Robust Online Stereo Adaptation
title_zh: PointFix：学习修复域偏差以实现强大的在线立体声适应
abstract: Online stereo adaptation tackles the domain shift problem, caused by different environments between synthetic (training) and real (test) datasets, to promptly adapt stereo models in dynamic real-world applications such as autonomous driving. However, previous methods often fail to counteract particular regions related to dynamic objects with more severe environmental changes. To mitigate this issue, we propose to incorporate an auxiliary point-selective network into a meta-learning framework, called PointFix, to provide a robust initialization of stereo models for online stereo adaptation. In a nutshell, our auxiliary network learns to fix local variants intensively by effectively back-propagating local information through the meta-gradient for the robust initialization of the baseline model. This network is model-agnostic, so can be used in any kind of architectures in a plug-and-play manner. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the effectiveness of our method under three adaptation settings such as short-, mid-, and long-term sequences. Experimental results show that the proper initialization of the base stereo model by the auxiliary network enables our learning paradigm to achieve state-of-the-art performance at inference.
summary: Online stereo adaptation tackles the domain shift problem, caused by different environments between synthetic (training) and real (test) datasets, to promptly adapt stereo models in dynamic real-world applications such as autonomous driving. However, previous methods often fail to counteract particular regions related to dynamic objects with more severe environmental changes. To mitigate this issue, we propose to incorporate an auxiliary point-selective network into a meta-learning framework, called PointFix, to provide a robust initialization of stereo models for online stereo adaptation. In a nutshell, our auxiliary network learns to fix local variants intensively by effectively back-propagating local information through the meta-gradient for the robust initialization of the baseline model. This network is model-agnostic, so can be used in any kind of architectures in a plug-and-play manner. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the effectiveness of our method under three adaptation settings such as short-, mid-, and long-term sequences. Experimental results show that the proper initialization of the base stereo model by the auxiliary network enables our learning paradigm to achieve state-of-the-art performance at inference.
abstract_zh: 在线立体适应解决了由合成（训练）和真实（测试）数据集之间的不同环境引起的域转移问题，以便在自动驾驶等动态现实应用中快速适应立体模型。 However, previous methods often fail to counteract particular regions related to dynamic objects with more severe environmental changes.为了缓解这个问题，我们建议将辅助点选择网络纳入元学习框架（称为 PointFix）中，为在线立体适应提供稳健的立体模型初始化。简而言之，我们的辅助网络通过元梯度有效地反向传播局部信息来学习集中修复局部变量，以实现基线模型的稳健初始化。 This network is model-agnostic, so can be used in any kind of architectures in a plug-and-play manner.我们进行了大量的实验，以验证我们的方法在短期、中期和长期序列等三种适应设置下的有效性。实验结果表明，辅助网络对基础立体模型的正确初始化使我们的学习范例能够在推理时实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointFix方法，通过辅助点选择网络与元学习框架结合，解决在线立体视觉适应中的领域偏差问题，提升动态真实环境下的模型适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有在线立体适应方法难以应对动态物体区域的剧烈环境变化，导致模型鲁棒性不足，需设计新的初始化策略以增强适应性。
AI.method: 设计模型无关的辅助点选择网络，通过元梯度反向传播局部信息强化基线模型初始化，实现对领域偏差的有效修正。
AI.result: 在短、中、长期序列三种适应场景下实验表明，PointFix方法在推理性能上达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: PointFix通过针对性初始化有效缓解领域偏移，其模块化设计支持多种架构应用，为在线立体视觉适应提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Zhanpeng Feng,Shiliang Zhang,Rinyoichi Takezoe,Wenze Hu,Manmohan Chandraker,Li-Jia Li,Vijay K. Narayanan,Xiaoyu Wang
title: ALBench: A Framework for Evaluating Active Learning in Object Detection
title_zh: ALBench：评估目标检测中主动学习的框架
abstract: Active learning is an important technology for automated machine learning systems. In contrast to Neural Architecture Search (NAS) which aims at automating neural network architecture design, active learning aims at automating training data selection. It is especially critical for training a long-tailed task, in which positive samples are sparsely distributed. Active learning alleviates the expensive data annotation issue through incrementally training models powered with efficient data selection. Instead of annotating all unlabeled samples, it iteratively selects and annotates the most valuable samples. Active learning has been popular in image classification, but has not been fully explored in object detection. Most of current approaches on object detection are evaluated with different settings, making it difficult to fairly compare their performance. To facilitate the research in this field, this paper contributes an active learning benchmark framework named as ALBench for evaluating active learning in object detection. Developed on an automatic deep model training system, this ALBench framework is easy-to-use, compatible with different active learning algorithms, and ensures the same training and testing protocols. We hope this automated benchmark system help researchers to easily reproduce literature's performance and have objective comparisons with prior arts. The code will be release through Github.
summary: Active learning is an important technology for automated machine learning systems. In contrast to Neural Architecture Search (NAS) which aims at automating neural network architecture design, active learning aims at automating training data selection. It is especially critical for training a long-tailed task, in which positive samples are sparsely distributed. Active learning alleviates the expensive data annotation issue through incrementally training models powered with efficient data selection. Instead of annotating all unlabeled samples, it iteratively selects and annotates the most valuable samples. Active learning has been popular in image classification, but has not been fully explored in object detection. Most of current approaches on object detection are evaluated with different settings, making it difficult to fairly compare their performance. To facilitate the research in this field, this paper contributes an active learning benchmark framework named as ALBench for evaluating active learning in object detection. Developed on an automatic deep model training system, this ALBench framework is easy-to-use, compatible with different active learning algorithms, and ensures the same training and testing protocols. We hope this automated benchmark system help researchers to easily reproduce literature's performance and have objective comparisons with prior arts. The code will be release through Github.
abstract_zh: 主动学习是自动化机器学习系统的一项重要技术。与旨在自动化神经网络架构设计的神经架构搜索（NAS）不同，主动学习旨在自动化训练数据选择。这对于训练正样本分布稀疏的长尾任务尤其重要。主动学习通过高效数据选择支持的增量训练模型缓解了昂贵的数据注释问题。它不是注释所有未标记的样本，而是迭代地选择并注释最有价值的样本。主动学习在图像分类中很流行，但在目标检测中尚未得到充分探索。当前大多数物体检测方法都是使用不同的设置进行评估的，因此很难公平地比较它们的性能。为了促进该领域的研究，本文贡献了一个名为 ALBench 的主动学习基准框架，用于评估目标检测中的主动学习。该ALBench框架基于自动深度模型训练系统开发，易于使用，兼容不同的主动学习算法，并确保相同的训练和测试协议。我们希望这个自动化基准系统能够帮助研究人员轻松地重现文献的表现并与现有技术进行客观的比较。代码将通过Github发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ALBench的主动学习基准框架，用于评估主动学习在目标检测中的效果。
AI.motivation: 主动学习在图像分类中已被广泛应用，但在目标检测中尚未得到充分探索，现有方法因评估设置不同而难以公平比较。
AI.method: 本文基于自动深度模型训练系统开发了ALBench框架，该框架易于使用，兼容不同的主动学习算法，并确保相同的训练和测试协议。
AI.result: 该框架有助于研究人员轻松复现文献中的性能，并与现有方法进行客观比较。
AI.conclusion: ALBench为研究主动学习在目标检测中的应用提供了有效的基准工具。
