authors_text: Xin Chen,Ke Ding
title: Two-Stream UNET Networks for Semantic Segmentation in Medical Images
title_zh: 用于医学图像语义分割的双流 UNET 网络
abstract: Recent advances of semantic image segmentation greatly benefit from deeper and larger Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models. Compared to image segmentation in the wild, properties of both medical images themselves and of existing medical datasets hinder training deeper and larger models because of overfitting. To this end, we propose a novel two-stream UNET architecture for automatic end-to-end medical image segmentation, in which intensity value and gradient vector flow (GVF) are two inputs for each stream, respectively. We demonstrate that two-stream CNNs with more low-level features greatly benefit semantic segmentation for imperfect medical image datasets. Our proposed two-stream networks are trained and evaluated on the popular medical image segmentation benchmarks, and the results are competitive with the state of the art. The code will be released soon.
summary: Recent advances of semantic image segmentation greatly benefit from deeper and larger Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models. Compared to image segmentation in the wild, properties of both medical images themselves and of existing medical datasets hinder training deeper and larger models because of overfitting. To this end, we propose a novel two-stream UNET architecture for automatic end-to-end medical image segmentation, in which intensity value and gradient vector flow (GVF) are two inputs for each stream, respectively. We demonstrate that two-stream CNNs with more low-level features greatly benefit semantic segmentation for imperfect medical image datasets. Our proposed two-stream networks are trained and evaluated on the popular medical image segmentation benchmarks, and the results are competitive with the state of the art. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: Recent advances of semantic image segmentation greatly benefit from deeper and larger Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models.与自然图像分割相比，医学图像本身和现有医学数据集的属性由于过度拟合而阻碍了训练更深和更大的模型。为此，我们提出了一种用于自动端到端医学图像分割的新型双流UNET架构，其中强度值和梯度向量流（GVF）分别是每个流的两个输入。 We demonstrate that two-stream CNNs with more low-level features greatly benefit semantic segmentation for imperfect medical image datasets.我们提出的双流网络在流行的医学图像分割基准上进行了训练和评估，其结果与最先进的技术具有竞争力。 The code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流UNET网络架构，用于解决医学图像语义分割中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集存在样本量少、噪声多等特点，限制了深层模型训练并易导致过拟合。
AI.method: 设计双流UNET网络，分别以图像强度值和梯度向量流（GVF）作为输入流，融合低级特征提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像分割基准测试中，该方法性能达到当时最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: 双流特征融合策略能有效提升医学图像分割效果，代码将公开供研究使用。

search_text: Two-Stream UNET Networks for Semantic Segmentation in Medical Images 用于医学图像语义分割的双流 UNET 网络 Recent advances of semantic image segmentation greatly benefit from deeper and larger Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models. Compared to image segmentation in the wild, properties of both medical images themselves and of existing medical datasets hinder training deeper and larger models because of overfitting. To this end, we propose a novel two-stream UNET architecture for automatic end-to-end medical image segmentation, in which intensity value and gradient vector flow (GVF) are two inputs for each stream, respectively. We demonstrate that two-stream CNNs with more low-level features greatly benefit semantic segmentation for imperfect medical image datasets. Our proposed two-stream networks are trained and evaluated on the popular medical image segmentation benchmarks, and the results are competitive with the state of the art. The code will be released soon. Recent advances of semantic image segmentation greatly benefit from deeper and larger Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models.与自然图像分割相比，医学图像本身和现有医学数据集的属性由于过度拟合而阻碍了训练更深和更大的模型。为此，我们提出了一种用于自动端到端医学图像分割的新型双流UNET架构，其中强度值和梯度向量流（GVF）分别是每个流的两个输入。 We demonstrate that two-stream CNNs with more low-level features greatly benefit semantic segmentation for imperfect medical image datasets.我们提出的双流网络在流行的医学图像分割基准上进行了训练和评估，其结果与最先进的技术具有竞争力。 The code will be released soon. 本文提出一种双流UNET网络架构，用于解决医学图像语义分割中的过拟合问题。 Xin Chen,Ke Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Madhavaraj A,Bharathi Pilar,Ramakrishnan A G
title: Knowledge-driven Subword Grammar Modeling for Automatic Speech Recognition in Tamil and Kannada
title_zh: 用于泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别的知识驱动子词语法建模
abstract: In this paper, we present specially designed automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for the highly agglutinative and inflective languages of Tamil and Kannada that can recognize unlimited vocabulary of words. We use subwords as the basic lexical units for recognition and construct subword grammar weighted finite state transducer (SG-WFST) graphs for word segmentation that captures most of the complex word formation rules of the languages. We have identified the following category of words (i) verbs, (ii) nouns, (ii) pronouns, and (iv) numbers. The prefix, infix and suffix lists of subwords are created for each of these categories and are used to design the SG-WFST graphs. We also present a heuristic segmentation algorithm that can even segment exceptional words that do not follow the rules encapsulated in the SG-WFST graph. Most of the data-driven subword dictionary creation algorithms are computation driven, and hence do not guarantee morpheme-like units and so we have used the linguistic knowledge of the languages and manually created the subword dictionaries and the graphs. Finally, we train a deep neural network acoustic model and combine it with the pronunciation lexicon of the subword dictionary and the SG-WFST graph to build the subword-ASR systems. Since the subword-ASR produces subword sequences as output for a given test speech, we post-process its output to get the final word sequence, so that the actual number of words that can be recognized is much higher. Upon experimenting the subword-ASR system with the IISc-MILE Tamil and Kannada ASR corpora, we observe an absolute word error rate reduction of 12.39% and 13.56% over the baseline word-based ASR systems for Tamil and Kannada, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we present specially designed automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for the highly agglutinative and inflective languages of Tamil and Kannada that can recognize unlimited vocabulary of words. We use subwords as the basic lexical units for recognition and construct subword grammar weighted finite state transducer (SG-WFST) graphs for word segmentation that captures most of the complex word formation rules of the languages. We have identified the following category of words (i) verbs, (ii) nouns, (ii) pronouns, and (iv) numbers. The prefix, infix and suffix lists of subwords are created for each of these categories and are used to design the SG-WFST graphs. We also present a heuristic segmentation algorithm that can even segment exceptional words that do not follow the rules encapsulated in the SG-WFST graph. Most of the data-driven subword dictionary creation algorithms are computation driven, and hence do not guarantee morpheme-like units and so we have used the linguistic knowledge of the languages and manually created the subword dictionaries and the graphs. Finally, we train a deep neural network acoustic model and combine it with the pronunciation lexicon of the subword dictionary and the SG-WFST graph to build the subword-ASR systems. Since the subword-ASR produces subword sequences as output for a given test speech, we post-process its output to get the final word sequence, so that the actual number of words that can be recognized is much higher. Upon experimenting the subword-ASR system with the IISc-MILE Tamil and Kannada ASR corpora, we observe an absolute word error rate reduction of 12.39% and 13.56% over the baseline word-based ASR systems for Tamil and Kannada, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了专门为泰米尔语和卡纳达语的高度凝集和屈折语言设计的自动语音识别（ASR）系统，该系统可以识别无限词汇量的单词。我们使用子词作为识别的基本词汇单位，并构建子词语法加权有限状态转换器（SG-WFST）图进行分词，该图捕获了语言的大多数复杂的构词规则。我们已经确定了以下类别的单词（i）动词，（ii）名词，（ii）代词和（iv）数字。为每个类别创建子词的前缀、中缀和后缀列表，并用于设计 SG-WFST 图。我们还提出了一种启发式分割算法，甚至可以分割不遵循 SG-WFST 图中封装的规则的异常单词。大多数数据驱动的子词字典创建算法是计算驱动的，因此不能保证类似语素的单元，因此我们使用了语言的语言知识并手动创建了子词字典和图表。最后，我们训练深度神经网络声学模型，并将其与子词词典的发音词典和 SG-WFST 图相结合，构建子词 ASR 系统。由于子词 ASR 会产生子词序列作为给定测试语音的输出，因此我们对其输出进行后处理以获得最终的单词序列，因此可以识别的实际单词数量要高得多。在使用 IISc-MILE 泰米尔语和卡纳达语 ASR 语料库对子词 ASR 系统进行实验后，我们观察到泰米尔语和卡纳达语的绝对单词错误率比基于单词的基线 ASR 系统分别降低了 12.39% 和 13.56%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子词语法建模的自动语音识别系统，用于泰米尔语和卡纳达语的无限词汇量识别。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动的子词字典方法无法保证形态单位的准确性，而泰米尔语和卡纳达语作为高度屈折语言需要更精确的构词规则建模。
AI.method: 通过语言学知识手动构建子词字典，设计子词语法加权有限状态转移图（SG-WFST）捕捉构词规则，并结合深度神经网络声学模型与后处理算法实现无限词汇识别。
AI.result: 在IISc-MILE语料库测试中，泰米尔语和卡纳达语的词错误率分别较基线系统降低12.39%和13.56%。
AI.conclusion: 结合语言学知识的子词语法建模方法能有效提升高度屈折语言的ASR性能，实现更广泛的词汇覆盖。

authors_text: Madhavaraj A,Bharathi Pilar,Ramakrishnan A G
title: Subword Dictionary Learning and Segmentation Techniques for Automatic Speech Recognition in Tamil and Kannada
title_zh: 泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别的子词词典学习和分割技术
abstract: We present automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for Tamil and Kannada based on subword modeling to effectively handle unlimited vocabulary due to the highly agglutinative nature of the languages. We explore byte pair encoding (BPE), and proposed a variant of this algorithm named extended-BPE, and Morfessor tool to segment each word as subwords. We have effectively incorporated maximum likelihood (ML) and Viterbi estimation techniques with weighted finite state transducers (WFST) framework in these algorithms to learn the subword dictionary from a large text corpus. Using the learnt subword dictionary, the words in training data transcriptions are segmented to subwords and we train deep neural network ASR systems which recognize subword sequence for any given test speech utterance. The output subword sequence is then post-processed using deterministic rules to get the final word sequence such that the actual number of words that can be recognized is much larger. For Tamil ASR, We use 152 hours of data for training and 65 hours for testing, whereas for Kannada ASR, we use 275 hours for training and 72 hours for testing. Upon experimenting with different combination of segmentation and estimation techniques, we find that the word error rate (WER) reduces drastically when compared to the baseline word-level ASR, achieving a maximum absolute WER reduction of 6.24% and 6.63% for Tamil and Kannada respectively.
summary: We present automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for Tamil and Kannada based on subword modeling to effectively handle unlimited vocabulary due to the highly agglutinative nature of the languages. We explore byte pair encoding (BPE), and proposed a variant of this algorithm named extended-BPE, and Morfessor tool to segment each word as subwords. We have effectively incorporated maximum likelihood (ML) and Viterbi estimation techniques with weighted finite state transducers (WFST) framework in these algorithms to learn the subword dictionary from a large text corpus. Using the learnt subword dictionary, the words in training data transcriptions are segmented to subwords and we train deep neural network ASR systems which recognize subword sequence for any given test speech utterance. The output subword sequence is then post-processed using deterministic rules to get the final word sequence such that the actual number of words that can be recognized is much larger. For Tamil ASR, We use 152 hours of data for training and 65 hours for testing, whereas for Kannada ASR, we use 275 hours for training and 72 hours for testing. Upon experimenting with different combination of segmentation and estimation techniques, we find that the word error rate (WER) reduces drastically when compared to the baseline word-level ASR, achieving a maximum absolute WER reduction of 6.24% and 6.63% for Tamil and Kannada respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于子词建模的泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统，可有效处理由于语言的高度粘着性而产生的无限词汇量。我们探索了字节对编码（BPE），并提出了该算法的一种变体，称为扩展 BPE，并使用 Morfessor 工具将每个单词分割为子单词。我们在这些算法中有效地将最大似然（ML）和维特比估计技术与加权有限状态转换器（WFST）框架结合起来，从大型文本语料库中学习子词字典。使用学习到的子词字典，训练数据转录中的单词被分割为子词，并且我们训练深度神经网络 ASR 系统，该系统可以识别任何给定测试语音话语的子词序列。然后使用确定性规则对输出的子词序列进行后处理以获得最终的单词序列，使得可以识别的实际单词数量要大得多。对于泰米尔语 ASR，我们使用 152 小时的数据进行训练，65 小时的数据进行测试，而对于卡纳达语 ASR，我们使用 275 小时的数据进行训练，72 小时的数据进行测试。通过尝试不同的分割和估计技术组合，我们发现与基线单词级 ASR 相比，单词错误率 (WER) 大幅降低，泰米尔语和卡纳达语的最大绝对 WER 分别降低了 6.24% 和 6.63%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于子词建模的泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别系统，通过扩展BPE算法和Morfessor工具进行子词分割，并结合最大似然和Viterbi估计技术优化子词词典学习。
AI.motivation: 泰米尔语和卡纳达语具有高度粘着性，导致词汇量无限，传统基于单词的ASR系统难以处理，需通过子词建模应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 采用字节对编码（BPE）及其扩展算法、Morfessor工具进行子词分割，利用最大似然和Viterbi估计结合加权有限状态转换器（WFST）框架构建子词词典，并训练深度神经网络ASR系统，最后通过确定性规则进行后处理。
AI.result: 泰米尔语和卡纳达语的词错误率（WER）分别较基线系统降低6.24%和6.63%，且训练/测试数据量分别为152/65小时和275/72小时。
AI.conclusion: 子词建模有效提升了粘着性语言的ASR性能，扩展BPE与Morfessor结合的方法在处理无限词汇量场景中表现优异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于子词建模的泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别系统，通过扩展BPE算法和Morfessor工具进行子词分割，并结合最大似然和Viterbi估计技术优化子词词典学习。
ai_content.motivation: 泰米尔语和卡纳达语具有高度粘着性，导致词汇量无限，传统基于单词的ASR系统难以处理，需通过子词建模应对这一挑战。
ai_content.method: 采用字节对编码（BPE）及其扩展算法、Morfessor工具进行子词分割，利用最大似然和Viterbi估计结合加权有限状态转换器（WFST）框架构建子词词典，并训练深度神经网络ASR系统，最后通过确定性规则进行后处理。
ai_content.result: 泰米尔语和卡纳达语的词错误率（WER）分别较基线系统降低6.24%和6.63%，且训练/测试数据量分别为152/65小时和275/72小时。
ai_content.conclusion: 子词建模有效提升了粘着性语言的ASR性能，扩展BPE与Morfessor结合的方法在处理无限词汇量场景中表现优异。

search_text: Subword Dictionary Learning and Segmentation Techniques for Automatic Speech Recognition in Tamil and Kannada 泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别的子词词典学习和分割技术 We present automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for Tamil and Kannada based on subword modeling to effectively handle unlimited vocabulary due to the highly agglutinative nature of the languages. We explore byte pair encoding (BPE), and proposed a variant of this algorithm named extended-BPE, and Morfessor tool to segment each word as subwords. We have effectively incorporated maximum likelihood (ML) and Viterbi estimation techniques with weighted finite state transducers (WFST) framework in these algorithms to learn the subword dictionary from a large text corpus. Using the learnt subword dictionary, the words in training data transcriptions are segmented to subwords and we train deep neural network ASR systems which recognize subword sequence for any given test speech utterance. The output subword sequence is then post-processed using deterministic rules to get the final word sequence such that the actual number of words that can be recognized is much larger. For Tamil ASR, We use 152 hours of data for training and 65 hours for testing, whereas for Kannada ASR, we use 275 hours for training and 72 hours for testing. Upon experimenting with different combination of segmentation and estimation techniques, we find that the word error rate (WER) reduces drastically when compared to the baseline word-level ASR, achieving a maximum absolute WER reduction of 6.24% and 6.63% for Tamil and Kannada respectively. 我们提出了基于子词建模的泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统，可有效处理由于语言的高度粘着性而产生的无限词汇量。我们探索了字节对编码（BPE），并提出了该算法的一种变体，称为扩展 BPE，并使用 Morfessor 工具将每个单词分割为子单词。我们在这些算法中有效地将最大似然（ML）和维特比估计技术与加权有限状态转换器（WFST）框架结合起来，从大型文本语料库中学习子词字典。使用学习到的子词字典，训练数据转录中的单词被分割为子词，并且我们训练深度神经网络 ASR 系统，该系统可以识别任何给定测试语音话语的子词序列。然后使用确定性规则对输出的子词序列进行后处理以获得最终的单词序列，使得可以识别的实际单词数量要大得多。对于泰米尔语 ASR，我们使用 152 小时的数据进行训练，65 小时的数据进行测试，而对于卡纳达语 ASR，我们使用 275 小时的数据进行训练，72 小时的数据进行测试。通过尝试不同的分割和估计技术组合，我们发现与基线单词级 ASR 相比，单词错误率 (WER) 大幅降低，泰米尔语和卡纳达语的最大绝对 WER 分别降低了 6.24% 和 6.63%。 本文提出基于子词建模的泰米尔语和卡纳达语自动语音识别系统，通过扩展BPE算法和Morfessor工具进行子词分割，并结合最大似然和Viterbi估计技术优化子词词典学习。 Madhavaraj A,Bharathi Pilar,Ramakrishnan A G eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Daizong Liu,Wei Hu,Xin Li
title: Point Cloud Attacks in Graph Spectral Domain: When 3D Geometry Meets Graph Signal Processing
title_zh: 图谱域中的点云攻击：当 3D 几何遇到图信号处理时
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07261
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07261
abstract: With the increasing attention in various 3D safety-critical applications, point cloud learning models have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Although existing 3D attack methods achieve high success rates, they delve into the data space with point-wise perturbation, which may neglect the geometric characteristics. Instead, we propose point cloud attacks from a new perspective -- the graph spectral domain attack, aiming to perturb graph transform coefficients in the spectral domain that corresponds to varying certain geometric structure. Specifically, leveraging on graph signal processing, we first adaptively transform the coordinates of points onto the spectral domain via graph Fourier transform (GFT) for compact representation. Then, we analyze the influence of different spectral bands on the geometric structure, based on which we propose to perturb the GFT coefficients via a learnable graph spectral filter. Considering the low-frequency components mainly contribute to the rough shape of the 3D object, we further introduce a low-frequency constraint to limit perturbations within imperceptible high-frequency components. Finally, the adversarial point cloud is generated by transforming the perturbed spectral representation back to the data domain via the inverse GFT. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attack in terms of both the imperceptibility and attack success rates.
summary: With the increasing attention in various 3D safety-critical applications, point cloud learning models have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Although existing 3D attack methods achieve high success rates, they delve into the data space with point-wise perturbation, which may neglect the geometric characteristics. Instead, we propose point cloud attacks from a new perspective -- the graph spectral domain attack, aiming to perturb graph transform coefficients in the spectral domain that corresponds to varying certain geometric structure. Specifically, leveraging on graph signal processing, we first adaptively transform the coordinates of points onto the spectral domain via graph Fourier transform (GFT) for compact representation. Then, we analyze the influence of different spectral bands on the geometric structure, based on which we propose to perturb the GFT coefficients via a learnable graph spectral filter. Considering the low-frequency components mainly contribute to the rough shape of the 3D object, we further introduce a low-frequency constraint to limit perturbations within imperceptible high-frequency components. Finally, the adversarial point cloud is generated by transforming the perturbed spectral representation back to the data domain via the inverse GFT. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attack in terms of both the imperceptibility and attack success rates.
abstract_zh: 随着各种 3D 安全关键应用日益受到关注，点云学习模型已被证明容易受到对抗性攻击。尽管现有的3D攻击方法取得了很高的成功率，但它们以逐点扰动的方式深入研究数据空间，这可能会忽略几何特征。相反，我们从一个新的角度提出点云攻击——图谱域攻击，旨在扰乱谱域中与变化的某些几何结构相对应的图变换系数。具体来说，利用图信号处理，我们首先通过图傅里叶变换（GFT）将点的坐标自适应地变换到谱域上，以实现紧凑的表示。然后，我们分析了不同谱带对几何结构的影响，在此基础上我们提出通过可学习的图谱滤波器来扰动 GFT 系数。考虑到低频分量主要影响 3D 对象的粗糙形状，我们进一步引入低频约束来限制难以察觉的高频分量内的扰动。最后，通过逆 GFT 将扰动的谱表示变换回数据域，生成对抗点云。实验结果证明了所提出的攻击在不可察觉性和攻击成功率方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图谱域的点云对抗攻击方法，通过图信号处理技术扰动谱域系数，在保持攻击不可感知性的同时提升攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云攻击方法仅关注点空间扰动，忽视了几何结构特性，难以有效利用图谱域特征进行针对性攻击。
AI.method: 通过图傅里叶变换将点云映射到谱域，分析不同谱带对几何结构的影响，设计可学习的图谱滤波器扰动高频系数，并引入低频约束保证攻击不可感知性，最后通过逆变换生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持攻击不可感知性的同时，显著提升了攻击成功率，验证了谱域攻击的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文从图谱域视角提出新型点云攻击方法，通过结合几何结构与图信号处理技术，为3D安全研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mengxue Qu,Yu Wu,Wu Liu,Qiqi Gong,Xiaodan Liang,Olga Russakovsky,Yao Zhao,Yunchao Wei
title: SiRi: A Simple Selective Retraining Mechanism for Transformer-based Visual Grounding
title_zh: SiRi：一种简单的选择性再训练机制，用于基于 Transformer 的视觉接地
comment: 21 pages (including Supplementary Materials); Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: 21 pages (including Supplementary Materials); Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: In this paper, we investigate how to achieve better visual grounding with modern vision-language transformers, and propose a simple yet powerful Selective Retraining (SiRi) mechanism for this challenging task. Particularly, SiRi conveys a significant principle to the research of visual grounding, i.e., a better initialized vision-language encoder would help the model converge to a better local minimum, advancing the performance accordingly. In specific, we continually update the parameters of the encoder as the training goes on, while periodically re-initialize rest of the parameters to compel the model to be better optimized based on an enhanced encoder. SiRi can significantly outperform previous approaches on three popular benchmarks. Specifically, our method achieves 83.04% Top1 accuracy on RefCOCO+ testA, outperforming the state-of-the-art approaches (training from scratch) by more than 10.21%. Additionally, we reveal that SiRi performs surprisingly superior even with limited training data. We also extend it to transformer-based visual grounding models and other vision-language tasks to verify the validity.
summary: In this paper, we investigate how to achieve better visual grounding with modern vision-language transformers, and propose a simple yet powerful Selective Retraining (SiRi) mechanism for this challenging task. Particularly, SiRi conveys a significant principle to the research of visual grounding, i.e., a better initialized vision-language encoder would help the model converge to a better local minimum, advancing the performance accordingly. In specific, we continually update the parameters of the encoder as the training goes on, while periodically re-initialize rest of the parameters to compel the model to be better optimized based on an enhanced encoder. SiRi can significantly outperform previous approaches on three popular benchmarks. Specifically, our method achieves 83.04% Top1 accuracy on RefCOCO+ testA, outperforming the state-of-the-art approaches (training from scratch) by more than 10.21%. Additionally, we reveal that SiRi performs surprisingly superior even with limited training data. We also extend it to transformer-based visual grounding models and other vision-language tasks to verify the validity.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了如何利用现代视觉语言转换器实现更好的视觉基础，并为这项具有挑战性的任务提出了一种简单而强大的选择性再训练（SiRi）机制。特别是，SiRi 为视觉基础的研究传达了一个重要原则，即更好的初始化视觉语言编码器将帮助模型收敛到更好的局部最小值，从而相应地提高性能。具体来说，我们随着训练的进行不断更新编码器的参数，同时定期重新初始化其余参数，以迫使模型基于增强型编码器更好地优化。 SiRi 在三个流行基准测试中的表现明显优于以前的方法。具体来说，我们的方法在 RefCOCO+ testA 上实现了 83.04% 的 Top1 准确率，比最先进的方法（从头开始训练）高出 10.21% 以上。此外，我们还发现，即使训练数据有限，SiRi 也表现出惊人的优越性。我们还将其扩展到基于变压器的视觉基础模型和其他视觉语言任务以验证有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SiRi的选择性再训练机制，用于改进基于Transformer的视觉定位模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现代视觉语言Transformer在视觉定位任务中面临收敛到次优解的问题，而更好的编码器初始化可能帮助模型达到更优的局部最小值。
AI.method: 通过持续更新编码器参数并定期重新初始化其余参数，使模型基于增强的编码器进行更优优化。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO+ testA数据集上达到83.04%的Top1准确率，较现有方法提升超10.21%，且在有限训练数据下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SiRi机制有效提升了视觉定位性能，并扩展验证了其在其他视觉语言任务中的通用性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SiRi的选择性再训练机制，用于改进基于Transformer的视觉定位模型的性能。
motivation: 现代视觉语言Transformer在视觉定位任务中面临收敛到次优解的问题，而更好的编码器初始化可能帮助模型达到更优的局部最小值。
method: 通过持续更新编码器参数并定期重新初始化其余参数，使模型基于增强的编码器进行更优优化。
result: 在RefCOCO+ testA数据集上达到83.04%的Top1准确率，较现有方法提升超10.21%，且在有限训练数据下表现优异。
conclusion: SiRi机制有效提升了视觉定位性能，并扩展验证了其在其他视觉语言任务中的通用性。
search_text: SiRi: A Simple Selective Retraining Mechanism for Transformer-based Visual Grounding SiRi：一种简单的选择性再训练机制，用于基于 Transformer 的视觉接地 In this paper, we investigate how to achieve better visual grounding with modern vision-language transformers, and propose a simple yet powerful Selective Retraining (SiRi) mechanism for this challenging task. Particularly, SiRi conveys a significant principle to the research of visual grounding, i.e., a better initialized vision-language encoder would help the model converge to a better local minimum, advancing the performance accordingly. In specific, we continually update the parameters of the encoder as the training goes on, while periodically re-initialize rest of the parameters to compel the model to be better optimized based on an enhanced encoder. SiRi can significantly outperform previous approaches on three popular benchmarks. Specifically, our method achieves 83.04% Top1 accuracy on RefCOCO+ testA, outperforming the state-of-the-art approaches (training from scratch) by more than 10.21%. Additionally, we reveal that SiRi performs surprisingly superior even with limited training data. We also extend it to transformer-based visual grounding models and other vision-language tasks to verify the validity. 在本文中，我们研究了如何利用现代视觉语言转换器实现更好的视觉基础，并为这项具有挑战性的任务提出了一种简单而强大的选择性再训练（SiRi）机制。特别是，SiRi 为视觉基础的研究传达了一个重要原则，即更好的初始化视觉语言编码器将帮助模型收敛到更好的局部最小值，从而相应地提高性能。具体来说，我们随着训练的进行不断更新编码器的参数，同时定期重新初始化其余参数，以迫使模型基于增强型编码器更好地优化。 SiRi 在三个流行基准测试中的表现明显优于以前的方法。具体来说，我们的方法在 RefCOCO+ testA 上实现了 83.04% 的 Top1 准确率，比最先进的方法（从头开始训练）高出 10.21% 以上。此外，我们还发现，即使训练数据有限，SiRi 也表现出惊人的优越性。我们还将其扩展到基于变压器的视觉基础模型和其他视觉语言任务以验证有效性。 本文提出了一种名为SiRi的选择性再训练机制，用于改进基于Transformer的视觉定位模型的性能。 Mengxue Qu,Yu Wu,Wu Liu,Qiqi Gong,Xiaodan Liang,Olga Russakovsky,Yao Zhao,Yunchao Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Abhishek Chakraborty,Daniel Xing,Yuntao Liu,Ankur Srivastava
title: DynaMarks: Defending Against Deep Learning Model Extraction Using Dynamic Watermarking
title_zh: DynaMarks：使用动态水印防御深度学习模型提取
abstract: The functionality of a deep learning (DL) model can be stolen via model extraction where an attacker obtains a surrogate model by utilizing the responses from a prediction API of the original model. In this work, we propose a novel watermarking technique called DynaMarks to protect the intellectual property (IP) of DL models against such model extraction attacks in a black-box setting. Unlike existing approaches, DynaMarks does not alter the training process of the original model but rather embeds watermark into a surrogate model by dynamically changing the output responses from the original model prediction API based on certain secret parameters at inference runtime. The experimental outcomes on Fashion MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet datasets demonstrate the efficacy of DynaMarks scheme to watermark surrogate models while preserving the accuracies of the original models deployed in edge devices. In addition, we also perform experiments to evaluate the robustness of DynaMarks against various watermark removal strategies, thus allowing a DL model owner to reliably prove model ownership.
summary: The functionality of a deep learning (DL) model can be stolen via model extraction where an attacker obtains a surrogate model by utilizing the responses from a prediction API of the original model. In this work, we propose a novel watermarking technique called DynaMarks to protect the intellectual property (IP) of DL models against such model extraction attacks in a black-box setting. Unlike existing approaches, DynaMarks does not alter the training process of the original model but rather embeds watermark into a surrogate model by dynamically changing the output responses from the original model prediction API based on certain secret parameters at inference runtime. The experimental outcomes on Fashion MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet datasets demonstrate the efficacy of DynaMarks scheme to watermark surrogate models while preserving the accuracies of the original models deployed in edge devices. In addition, we also perform experiments to evaluate the robustness of DynaMarks against various watermark removal strategies, thus allowing a DL model owner to reliably prove model ownership.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 模型的功能可以通过模型提取来窃取，其中攻击者通过利用原始模型的预测 API 的响应来获取代理模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 DynaMarks 的新型水印技术，用于保护深度学习模型的知识产权 (IP)，使其免受黑盒设置中的此类模型提取攻击。与现有方法不同，DynaMarks 不会改变原始模型的训练过程，而是通过在推理运行时根据某些秘密参数动态更改原始模型预测 API 的输出响应，将水印嵌入到代理模型中。 Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的实验结果证明了 DynaMarks 方案对代理模型进行水印处理的有效性，同时保留了边缘设备中部署的原始模型的准确性。此外，我们还进行了实验来评估 DynaMarks 针对各种水印去除策略的稳健性，从而使 DL 模型所有者能够可靠地证明模型所有权。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DynaMarks的动态水印技术，用于在不改变原始模型训练过程的前提下，通过动态调整预测API输出来防御深度学习模型提取攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有模型水印方法多依赖修改训练过程或影响模型精度，而DynaMarks旨在实现无损保护，使模型在边缘设备部署时既能抵御提取攻击又保持原有性能。
AI.method: 在推理阶段根据预设秘密参数动态调整输出响应，将水印信息嵌入到攻击者训练的替代模型中，同时保持原始模型预测准确性。
AI.result: 在Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上验证了水印有效性，实验证明该方法在保持原始模型精度的同时，能有效抵御多种水印移除策略。
AI.conclusion: DynaMarks通过动态输出调整实现了对深度学习模型的无损知识产权保护，为模型所有者提供了可靠的版权证明手段。

authors_text: Gayoung Lee,Hyunsu Kim,Junho Kim,Seonghyeon Kim,Jung-Woo Ha,Yunjey Choi
title: Generator Knows What Discriminator Should Learn in Unconditional GANs
title_zh: 生成器知道判别器应该在无条件 GAN 中学习什么
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/GGDR
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/GGDR
abstract: Recent methods for conditional image generation benefit from dense supervision such as segmentation label maps to achieve high-fidelity. However, it is rarely explored to employ dense supervision for unconditional image generation. Here we explore the efficacy of dense supervision in unconditional generation and find generator feature maps can be an alternative of cost-expensive semantic label maps. From our empirical evidences, we propose a new generator-guided discriminator regularization(GGDR) in which the generator feature maps supervise the discriminator to have rich semantic representations in unconditional generation. In specific, we employ an U-Net architecture for discriminator, which is trained to predict the generator feature maps given fake images as inputs. Extensive experiments on mulitple datasets show that our GGDR consistently improves the performance of baseline methods in terms of quantitative and qualitative aspects. Code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/GGDR
summary: Recent methods for conditional image generation benefit from dense supervision such as segmentation label maps to achieve high-fidelity. However, it is rarely explored to employ dense supervision for unconditional image generation. Here we explore the efficacy of dense supervision in unconditional generation and find generator feature maps can be an alternative of cost-expensive semantic label maps. From our empirical evidences, we propose a new generator-guided discriminator regularization(GGDR) in which the generator feature maps supervise the discriminator to have rich semantic representations in unconditional generation. In specific, we employ an U-Net architecture for discriminator, which is trained to predict the generator feature maps given fake images as inputs. Extensive experiments on mulitple datasets show that our GGDR consistently improves the performance of baseline methods in terms of quantitative and qualitative aspects. Code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/GGDR
abstract_zh: 最近的条件图像生成方法受益于密集监督（例如分割标签图）以实现高保真度。然而，很少探索采用密集监督来生成无条件图像。在这里，我们探讨了无条件生成中密集监督的功效，并发现生成器特征图可以替代成本昂贵的语义标签图。根据我们的经验证据，我们提出了一种新的生成器引导的判别器正则化（GGDR），其中生成器特征图监督判别器在无条件生成中具有丰富的语义表示。具体来说，我们采用 U-Net 架构作为判别器，该架构经过训练，可以在给定假图像作为输入的情况下预测生成器特征图。对多个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的 GGDR 在定量和定性方面持续提高了基线方法的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/GGDR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成器引导的判别器正则化方法（GGDR），通过利用生成器特征图替代昂贵的语义标签，提升无条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有条件图像生成依赖分割标签等密集监督，但无条件生成中未充分探索此类监督。生成器特征图可能作为低成本替代方案，帮助判别器学习更丰富的语义表示。
AI.method: 采用U-Net结构的判别器，通过生成器特征图监督其训练，使其根据假图像预测生成器特征图，从而实现对判别器的正则化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证，GGDR在定量指标和生成质量上均显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GGDR有效利用生成器特征图作为密集监督，为无条件GAN提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索其在其他生成任务中的应用。

authors_text: Cong Wang,Hongmin Xu,Xiong Zhang,Li Wang,Zhitong Zheng,Haifeng Liu
title: Convolutional Embedding Makes Hierarchical Vision Transformer Stronger
title_zh: 卷积嵌入使分层视觉变压器变得更强
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have recently dominated a range of computer vision tasks, yet it suffers from low training data efficiency and inferior local semantic representation capability without appropriate inductive bias. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) inherently capture regional-aware semantics, inspiring researchers to introduce CNNs back into the architecture of the ViTs to provide desirable inductive bias for ViTs. However, is the locality achieved by the micro-level CNNs embedded in ViTs good enough? In this paper, we investigate the problem by profoundly exploring how the macro architecture of the hybrid CNNs/ViTs enhances the performances of hierarchical ViTs. Particularly, we study the role of token embedding layers, alias convolutional embedding (CE), and systemically reveal how CE injects desirable inductive bias in ViTs. Besides, we apply the optimal CE configuration to 4 recently released state-of-the-art ViTs, effectively boosting the corresponding performances. Finally, a family of efficient hybrid CNNs/ViTs, dubbed CETNets, are released, which may serve as generic vision backbones. Specifically, CETNets achieve 84.9% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K (training from scratch), 48.6% box mAP on the COCO benchmark, and 51.6% mIoU on the ADE20K, substantially improving the performances of the corresponding state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have recently dominated a range of computer vision tasks, yet it suffers from low training data efficiency and inferior local semantic representation capability without appropriate inductive bias. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) inherently capture regional-aware semantics, inspiring researchers to introduce CNNs back into the architecture of the ViTs to provide desirable inductive bias for ViTs. However, is the locality achieved by the micro-level CNNs embedded in ViTs good enough? In this paper, we investigate the problem by profoundly exploring how the macro architecture of the hybrid CNNs/ViTs enhances the performances of hierarchical ViTs. Particularly, we study the role of token embedding layers, alias convolutional embedding (CE), and systemically reveal how CE injects desirable inductive bias in ViTs. Besides, we apply the optimal CE configuration to 4 recently released state-of-the-art ViTs, effectively boosting the corresponding performances. Finally, a family of efficient hybrid CNNs/ViTs, dubbed CETNets, are released, which may serve as generic vision backbones. Specifically, CETNets achieve 84.9% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K (training from scratch), 48.6% box mAP on the COCO benchmark, and 51.6% mIoU on the ADE20K, substantially improving the performances of the corresponding state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）最近在一系列计算机视觉任务中占据主导地位，但在没有适当归纳偏差的情况下，它存在训练数据效率低和局部语义表示能力差的问题。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 本质上捕获区域感知语义，激励研究人员将 CNN 重新引入 ViT 架构中，为 ViT 提供理想的归纳偏差。然而，嵌入 ViT 中的微观 CNN 所实现的局部性是否足够好？在本文中，我们通过深入探索混合 CNN/ViT 的宏观架构如何增强分层 ViT 的性能来研究这个问题。特别是，我们研究了令牌嵌入层、别名卷积嵌入（CE）的作用，并系统地揭示了 CE 如何在 ViT 中注入所需的归纳偏差。此外，我们将最优的CE配置应用于最近发布的4个最先进的ViT，有效提升了相应的性能。最后，发布了一系列高效的混合 CNN/ViT（称为 CETNet），它们可以作为通用视觉主干。具体来说，CETNet 在 ImageNet-1K（从头开始训练）上实现了 84.9% 的 Top-1 准确率，在 COCO 基准上实现了 48.6% 的 box mAP，在 ADE20K 上实现了 51.6% mIoU，大大提高了相应最先进基准的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过引入卷积嵌入（CE）增强分层视觉Transformer（ViT）的性能，并提出高效的混合CNN/ViT架构CETNets。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer（ViT）在计算机视觉任务中表现优异，但存在训练数据效率低和局部语义表示能力不足的问题，需引入归纳偏置改进其性能。
AI.method: 通过深入分析混合CNN/ViT的宏观架构，系统研究卷积嵌入层（CE）在ViT中的作用，优化CE配置并应用于四种先进ViT模型，构建CETNets架构。
AI.result: CETNets在ImageNet-1K上达到84.9% Top-1准确率，在COCO上实现48.6% box mAP，在ADE20K上达到51.6% mIoU，显著优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 卷积嵌入有效增强了ViT的局部语义建模能力，CETNets作为通用视觉主干网络，为高效视觉模型设计提供了新方向。

authors_text: Lin Li,Jun Xiao,Hanrong Shi,Hanwang Zhang,Yi Yang,Wei Liu,Long Chen
title: NICEST: Noisy Label Correction and Training for Robust Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 最好的：噪声标签校正和鲁棒场景图生成的训练
comment: Extension of CVPR'22 work (The Devil is in the Labels: Noisy Label Correction for Robust Scene Graph Generation). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.03014
comments: Extension of CVPR'22 work (The Devil is in the Labels: Noisy Label Correction for Robust Scene Graph Generation). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.03014
abstract: Nearly all existing scene graph generation (SGG) models have overlooked the ground-truth annotation qualities of mainstream SGG datasets, i.e., they assume: 1) all the manually annotated positive samples are equally correct; 2) all the un-annotated negative samples are absolutely background. In this paper, we argue that neither of the assumptions applies to SGG: there are numerous noisy ground-truth predicate labels that break these two assumptions and harm the training of unbiased SGG models. To this end, we propose a novel NoIsy label CorrEction and Sample Training strategy for SGG: NICEST. Specifically, it consists of two parts: NICE and NIST, which rule out these noisy label issues by generating high-quality samples and the effective training strategy, respectively. NICE first detects noisy samples and then reassigns them more high-quality soft predicate labels. NIST is a multi-teacher knowledge distillation based training strategy, which enables the model to learn unbiased fusion knowledge. And a dynamic trade-off weighting strategy in NIST is designed to penalize the bias of different teachers. Due to the model-agnostic nature of both NICE and NIST, our NICEST can be seamlessly incorporated into any SGG architecture to boost its performance on different predicate categories. In addition, to better evaluate the generalization of SGG models, we further propose a new benchmark VG-OOD, by re-organizing the prevalent VG dataset and deliberately making the predicate distributions of the training and test sets as different as possible for each subject-object category pair. This new benchmark helps disentangle the influence of subject-object category based frequency biases. Extensive ablations and results on different backbones and tasks have attested to the effectiveness and generalization ability of each component of NICEST.

In this paper, we argue that neither of the assumptions applies to SGG: there are numerous noisy ground-truth predicate labels that break these two assumptions and harm the training of unbiased SGG models. To this end, we propose a novel NoIsy label CorrEction and Sample Training strategy for SGG: NICEST. Specifically, it consists of two parts: NICE and NIST, which rule out these noisy label issues by generating high-quality samples and the effective training strategy, respectively. NICE first detects noisy samples and then reassigns them more high-quality soft predicate labels. NIST is a multi-teacher knowledge distillation based training strategy, which enables the model to learn unbiased fusion knowledge. And a dynamic trade-off weighting strategy in NIST is designed to penalize the bias of different teachers. Due to the model-agnostic nature of both NICE and NIST, our NICEST can be seamlessly incorporated into any SGG architecture to boost its performance on different predicate categories. In addition, to better evaluate the generalization of SGG models, we further propose a new benchmark VG-OOD, by re-organizing the prevalent VG dataset and deliberately making the predicate distributions of the training and test sets as different as possible for each subject-object category pair. This new benchmark helps disentangle the influence of subject-object category based frequency biases. Extensive ablations and results on different backbones and tasks have attested to the effectiveness and generalization ability of each component of NICEST.
abstract_zh: 几乎所有现有的场景图生成（SGG）模型都忽略了主流SGG数据集的真实标注质量，即它们假设：1）所有手动标注的正样本都同样正确； 2）所有未注释的负样本绝对是背景。在本文中，我们认为这两个假设都不适用于 SGG：存在大量嘈杂的真实谓词标签，它们打破了这两个假设并损害了无偏 SGG 模型的训练。为此，我们为 SGG 提出了一种新颖的 NoIsy 标签 CorrEction 和样本训练策略：NICEST。具体来说，它由两部分组成：NICE和NIST，分别通过生成高质量样本和有效的训练策略来排除这些噪声标签问题。 NICE 首先检测噪声样本，然后为它们重新分配更高质量的软谓词标签。 NIST是一种基于多教师知识蒸馏的训练策略，使模型能够学习无偏差的融合知识。 NIST 设计了动态权衡权重策略来惩罚不同教师的偏见。由于 NICE 和 NIST 与模型无关的性质，我们的 NICEST 可以无缝地合并到任何 SGG 架构中，以提高其在不同谓词类别上的性能。此外，为了更好地评估 SGG 模型的泛化能力，我们进一步提出了一个新的基准 VG-OOD，通过重新组织流行的 VG 数据集，并故意使每个主客体类别对的训练集和测试集的谓词分布尽可能不同。这个新基准有助于消除基于主客体类别的频率偏差的影响。不同主干和任务上的广泛消融和结果证明了 NICEST 每个组件的有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NICEST方法，通过修正噪声标签和优化训练策略，提升场景图生成模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成模型假设所有人工标注的正样本完全正确且未标注的负样本均为背景，但实际存在大量噪声标签，影响模型训练效果。
AI.method: NICEST包含两部分：NICE检测并修正噪声样本的软标签，NIST采用多教师知识蒸馏训练策略并设计动态权重策略。同时提出新基准VG-OOD用于评估模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在不同主干网络和任务上的大量实验验证了NICEST各组件的有效性和泛化能力，显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: NICEST通过噪声标签修正和训练优化有效提升场景图生成模型鲁棒性，新基准有助于分离主体-客体频率偏差的影响。

In addition, to better evaluate the generalization of SGG models, we further propose a new benchmark VG-OOD, by re-organizing the prevalent VG dataset and deliberately making the predicate distributions of the training and test sets as different as possible for each subject-object category pair. This new benchmark helps disentangle the influence of subject-object category based frequency biases. Extensive ablations and results on different backbones and tasks have attested to the effectiveness and generalization ability of each component of NICEST. 几乎所有现有的场景图生成（SGG）模型都忽略了主流SGG数据集的真实标注质量，即它们假设：1）所有手动标注的正样本都同样正确； 2）所有未注释的负样本绝对是背景。在本文中，我们认为这两个假设都不适用于 SGG：存在大量嘈杂的真实谓词标签，它们打破了这两个假设并损害了无偏 SGG 模型的训练。为此，我们为 SGG 提出了一种新颖的 NoIsy 标签 CorrEction 和样本训练策略：NICEST。具体来说，它由两部分组成：NICE和NIST，分别通过生成高质量样本和有效的训练策略来排除这些噪声标签问题。 NICE 首先检测噪声样本，然后为它们重新分配更高质量的软谓词标签。 NIST是一种基于多教师知识蒸馏的训练策略，使模型能够学习无偏差的融合知识。 NIST 设计了动态权衡权重策略来惩罚不同教师的偏见。由于 NICE 和 NIST 与模型无关的性质，我们的 NICEST 可以无缝地合并到任何 SGG 架构中，以提高其在不同谓词类别上的性能。此外，为了更好地评估 SGG 模型的泛化能力，我们进一步提出了一个新的基准 VG-OOD，通过重新组织流行的 VG 数据集，并故意使每个主客体类别对的训练集和测试集的谓词分布尽可能不同。这个新基准有助于消除基于主客体类别的频率偏差的影响。不同主干和任务上的广泛消融和结果证明了 NICEST 每个组件的有效性和泛化能力。 本文提出NICEST方法，通过修正噪声标签和优化训练策略，提升场景图生成模型的鲁棒性。 Lin Li,Jun Xiao,Hanrong Shi,Hanwang Zhang,Yi Yang,Wei Liu,Long Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Yixuan Fan,Zhaopeng Dou,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang
title: Portrait Interpretation and a Benchmark
title_zh: 肖像解读和基准
abstract: We propose a task we name Portrait Interpretation and construct a dataset named Portrait250K for it. Current researches on portraits such as human attribute recognition and person re-identification have achieved many successes, but generally, they: 1) may lack mining the interrelationship between various tasks and the possible benefits it may bring; 2) design deep models specifically for each task, which is inefficient; 3) may be unable to cope with the needs of a unified model and comprehensive perception in actual scenes. In this paper, the proposed portrait interpretation recognizes the perception of humans from a new systematic perspective. We divide the perception of portraits into three aspects, namely Appearance, Posture, and Emotion, and design corresponding sub-tasks for each aspect. Based on the framework of multi-task learning, portrait interpretation requires a comprehensive description of static attributes and dynamic states of portraits. To invigorate research on this new task, we construct a new dataset that contains 250,000 images labeled with identity, gender, age, physique, height, expression, and posture of the whole body and arms. Our dataset is collected from 51 movies, hence covering extensive diversity. Furthermore, we focus on representation learning for portrait interpretation and propose a baseline that reflects our systematic perspective. We also propose an appropriate metric for this task. Our experimental results demonstrate that combining the tasks related to portrait interpretation can yield benefits. Code and dataset will be made public.
summary: We propose a task we name Portrait Interpretation and construct a dataset named Portrait250K for it. Current researches on portraits such as human attribute recognition and person re-identification have achieved many successes, but generally, they: 1) may lack mining the interrelationship between various tasks and the possible benefits it may bring; 2) design deep models specifically for each task, which is inefficient; 3) may be unable to cope with the needs of a unified model and comprehensive perception in actual scenes. In this paper, the proposed portrait interpretation recognizes the perception of humans from a new systematic perspective. We divide the perception of portraits into three aspects, namely Appearance, Posture, and Emotion, and design corresponding sub-tasks for each aspect. Based on the framework of multi-task learning, portrait interpretation requires a comprehensive description of static attributes and dynamic states of portraits. To invigorate research on this new task, we construct a new dataset that contains 250,000 images labeled with identity, gender, age, physique, height, expression, and posture of the whole body and arms. Our dataset is collected from 51 movies, hence covering extensive diversity. Furthermore, we focus on representation learning for portrait interpretation and propose a baseline that reflects our systematic perspective. We also propose an appropriate metric for this task. Our experimental results demonstrate that combining the tasks related to portrait interpretation can yield benefits. Code and dataset will be made public.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为 Portrait Interpretation 的任务，并为其构建了一个名为 Portrait250K 的数据集。目前关于人物属性识别、人物重识别等肖像的研究已经取得了很多成功，但总体上来说，它们：1）可能缺乏挖掘各种任务之间的相互关系及其可能带来的好处； 2）专门为每个任务设计深度模型，效率低下； 3）可能无法应对实际场景中统一模型和综合感知的需求。在本文中，提出的肖像解释从新的系统角度认识了人类的感知。我们将肖像的感知分为三个方面，即外观、姿势和情感，并为每个方面设计相应的子任务。基于多任务学习的框架，肖像解读需要对肖像的静态属性和动态状态进行综合描述。为了激发对这项新任务的研究，我们构建了一个新的数据集，其中包含 250,000 张标记有身份、性别、年龄、体格、身高、表情以及全身和手臂姿势的图像。我们的数据集收集自 51 部电影，因此涵盖了广泛的多样性。此外，我们专注于肖像解释的表示学习，并提出了反映我们系统观点的基线。我们还为此任务提出了适当的指标。我们的实验结果表明，结合与肖像解释相关的任务可以产生好处。代码和数据集将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为‘肖像解释’的新任务，并构建了一个包含25万张图像的标注数据集Portrait250K，用于从外观、姿态和情绪三个维度系统性地识别肖像中的感知信息。
AI.motivation: 现有肖像相关研究（如人体属性识别、行人重识别）存在三个问题：1）未充分挖掘任务间的关联性；2）为每个任务单独设计模型效率低下；3）难以满足实际场景中统一模型的综合感知需求。
AI.method: 将肖像感知分为外观、姿态、情绪三方面，设计对应子任务；基于多任务学习框架构建统一模型，提出包含身份、性别、年龄等标签的电影来源数据集，并设计相应的表示学习基线和评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合肖像解释相关任务能提升模型性能，验证了多任务协同的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统性框架和大规模数据集推动了肖像解释任务的研究，为统一模型设计和跨任务学习提供了新方向。

authors_text: Grace H. Wolff,Cuihua Shen
title: Social Live-Streaming Use & Well-being: Examining Participation, Financial Commitment, Social Capital, and Psychological Well-being on Twitch.tv
title_zh: 社交直播的使用和幸福感：在 Twitch.tv 上检查参与度、财务承诺、社会资本和心理健康度
abstract: This study examines how active participation, financial commitment, and passive participation in the leading social live-streaming service, Twitch.tv, relate to individuals' psychological well-being. The three dimensions of social capital-structural, relational, and cognitive-as well as parasocial relationship are explored as mediators. Cross-sectional survey data from 396 respondents was analyzed by comparing two fully saturated structural equation models. Findings indicate actively participating in a favorite streamers' Chat is positively associated with increased well-being. Structural social capital, or having more social interaction ties, positively mediates the relationship between active participation and well-being, as well as financial commitment and well-being. Greater cognitive social capital, or shared values and goals with a favorite streamer, is related to decreased well-being. Parasocial relationship does not significantly mediate the relationship between use and well-being. Our results demonstrate the importance of tangible social ties over the perceived relationships or identification with a favorite streamer.
summary: This study examines how active participation, financial commitment, and passive participation in the leading social live-streaming service, Twitch.tv, relate to individuals' psychological well-being. The three dimensions of social capital-structural, relational, and cognitive-as well as parasocial relationship are explored as mediators. Cross-sectional survey data from 396 respondents was analyzed by comparing two fully saturated structural equation models. Findings indicate actively participating in a favorite streamers' Chat is positively associated with increased well-being. Structural social capital, or having more social interaction ties, positively mediates the relationship between active participation and well-being, as well as financial commitment and well-being. Greater cognitive social capital, or shared values and goals with a favorite streamer, is related to decreased well-being. Parasocial relationship does not significantly mediate the relationship between use and well-being. Our results demonstrate the importance of tangible social ties over the perceived relationships or identification with a favorite streamer.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了领先的社交直播服务 Twitch.tv 的主动参与、财务承诺和被动参与与个人心理健康的关系。社会资本的三个维度——结构性、关系性和认知性——以及准社会关系都被作为中介进行了探索。通过比较两个完全饱和的结构方程模型，对 396 名受访者的横截面调查数据进行了分析。研究结果表明，积极参与喜爱的主播聊天与幸福感的提高呈正相关。结构性社会资本，或者说拥有更多的社会互动关系，可以积极地调节积极参与和福祉以及财务承诺和福祉之间的关系。更大的认知社会资本，或者与最喜欢的主播有共同的价值观和目标，与幸福感下降有关。准社会关系并不显着调节使用和幸福感之间的关系。我们的结果表明，有形的社会关系比感知到的关系或对最喜欢的主播的认同更重要。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨Twitch.tv用户参与度、财务投入及社会资本等因素对心理幸福感的影响机制。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体对心理健康影响日益显著，研究者希望明确直播平台使用行为与幸福感的具体关联路径，特别是社会资本的中介作用。
AI.method: 基于396名用户的横断面调查数据，通过比较两个完全饱和的结构方程模型，检验参与度、财务投入与幸福感之间的关系及社会资本的中介效应。
AI.result: 积极参与主播聊天与幸福感正相关；结构社会资本（社交联系）在参与度与幸福感间起正向中介作用，认知社会资本（价值观契合）则呈负相关；拟社会关系未显著中介使用行为与幸福感的关系。
AI.conclusion: 实际社交联系比拟社会关系更能促进直播平台用户的幸福感，提示平台设计应强化真实社交互动而非仅依赖情感认同。

Our results demonstrate the importance of tangible social ties over the perceived relationships or identification with a favorite streamer. 本研究探讨了领先的社交直播服务 Twitch.tv 的主动参与、财务承诺和被动参与与个人心理健康的关系。社会资本的三个维度——结构性、关系性和认知性——以及准社会关系都被作为中介进行了探索。通过比较两个完全饱和的结构方程模型，对 396 名受访者的横截面调查数据进行了分析。研究结果表明，积极参与喜爱的主播聊天与幸福感的提高呈正相关。结构性社会资本，或者说拥有更多的社会互动关系，可以积极地调节积极参与和福祉以及财务承诺和福祉之间的关系。更大的认知社会资本，或者与最喜欢的主播有共同的价值观和目标，与幸福感下降有关。准社会关系并不显着调节使用和幸福感之间的关系。我们的结果表明，有形的社会关系比感知到的关系或对最喜欢的主播的认同更重要。 本研究探讨Twitch.tv用户参与度、财务投入及社会资本等因素对心理幸福感的影响机制。 Grace H. Wolff,Cuihua Shen cs.SI,cs.HC

authors_text: Xin Zhao,Zhiwei Fang,Yuchen Guo,Jie He,Wenlong Chen,Changping Peng
title: JDRec: Practical Actor-Critic Framework for Online Combinatorial Recommender System
title_zh: JDRec：在线组合推荐系统的实用演员评论家框架
abstract: A combinatorial recommender (CR) system feeds a list of items to a user at a time in the result page, in which the user behavior is affected by both contextual information and items. The CR is formulated as a combinatorial optimization problem with the objective of maximizing the recommendation reward of the whole list. Despite its importance, it is still a challenge to build a practical CR system, due to the efficiency, dynamics, personalization requirement in online environment. In particular, we tear the problem into two sub-problems, list generation and list evaluation. Novel and practical model architectures are designed for these sub-problems aiming at jointly optimizing effectiveness and efficiency. In order to adapt to online case, a bootstrap algorithm forming an actor-critic reinforcement framework is given to explore better recommendation mode in long-term user interaction. Offline and online experiment results demonstrate the efficacy of proposed JDRec framework. JDRec has been applied in online JD recommendation, improving click through rate by 2.6% and synthetical value for the platform by 5.03%. We will publish the large-scale dataset used in this study to contribute to the research community.
summary: A combinatorial recommender (CR) system feeds a list of items to a user at a time in the result page, in which the user behavior is affected by both contextual information and items. The CR is formulated as a combinatorial optimization problem with the objective of maximizing the recommendation reward of the whole list. Despite its importance, it is still a challenge to build a practical CR system, due to the efficiency, dynamics, personalization requirement in online environment. In particular, we tear the problem into two sub-problems, list generation and list evaluation. Novel and practical model architectures are designed for these sub-problems aiming at jointly optimizing effectiveness and efficiency. In order to adapt to online case, a bootstrap algorithm forming an actor-critic reinforcement framework is given to explore better recommendation mode in long-term user interaction. Offline and online experiment results demonstrate the efficacy of proposed JDRec framework. JDRec has been applied in online JD recommendation, improving click through rate by 2.6% and synthetical value for the platform by 5.03%. We will publish the large-scale dataset used in this study to contribute to the research community.
abstract_zh: 组合推荐（CR）系统在结果页面中一次向用户提供项目列表，其中用户行为受到上下文信息和项目的影响。 CR被表述为一个组合优化问题，其目标是最大化整个列表的推荐奖励。尽管其重要性，但由于在线环境中的效率、动态性、个性化要求，构建实用的CR系统仍然是一个挑战。特别是，我们将问题分为两个子问题：列表生成和列表评估。针对这些子问题设计了新颖实用的模型架构，旨在共同优化有效性和效率。为了适应在线案例，给出了形成演员-评论家强化框架的引导算法，以探索长期用户交互中更好的推荐模式。离线和在线实验结果证明了所提出的 JDRec 框架的有效性。 JDRec应用于京东在线推荐，点击率提升2.6%，平台综合价值提升5.03%。我们将发布本研究中使用的大规模数据集，为研究社区做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JDRec框架，通过结合Actor-Critic强化学习方法解决在线组合推荐系统中的效率、动态性和个性化挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有组合推荐系统难以同时满足在线环境下的高效性、动态适应性和个性化需求，亟需一种实用的联合优化方案。
AI.method: 将问题拆解为列表生成与评估两个子问题，设计专用模型架构，并采用自引导算法构建Actor-Critic框架以适应长期用户交互。
AI.result: 在线应用使点击率提升2.6%，平台综合价值增长5.03%，并公开大规模数据集支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: JDRec通过分阶段优化与强化学习有效解决了组合推荐的核心挑战，为行业实践与学术研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Donglin Xie,Ruonan Yu,Gongfan Fang,Jie Song,Zunlei Feng,Xinchao Wang,Li Sun,Mingli Song
title: Federated Selective Aggregation for Knowledge Amalgamation
title_zh: 知识融合的联合选择性聚合
abstract: In this paper, we explore a new knowledge-amalgamation problem, termed Federated Selective Aggregation (FedSA). The goal of FedSA is to train a student model for a new task with the help of several decentralized teachers, whose pre-training tasks and data are different and agnostic. Our motivation for investigating such a problem setup stems from a recent dilemma of model sharing. Many researchers or institutes have spent enormous resources on training large and competent networks. Due to the privacy, security, or intellectual property issues, they are, however, not able to share their own pre-trained models, even if they wish to contribute to the community. The proposed FedSA offers a solution to this dilemma and makes it one step further since, again, the learned student may specialize in a new task different from all of the teachers. To this end, we proposed a dedicated strategy for handling FedSA. Specifically, our student-training process is driven by a novel saliency-based approach that adaptively selects teachers as the participants and integrates their representative capabilities into the student. To evaluate the effectiveness of FedSA, we conduct experiments on both single-task and multi-task settings. Experimental results demonstrate that FedSA effectively amalgamates knowledge from decentralized models and achieves competitive performance to centralized baselines.

The goal of FedSA is to train a student model for a new task with the help of several decentralized teachers, whose pre-training tasks and data are different and agnostic. Our motivation for investigating such a problem setup stems from a recent dilemma of model sharing. The proposed FedSA offers a solution to this dilemma and makes it one step further since, again, the learned student may specialize in a new task different from all of the teachers. To this end, we proposed a dedicated strategy for handling FedSA. Specifically, our student-training process is driven by a novel saliency-based approach that adaptively selects teachers as the participants and integrates their representative capabilities into the student. To evaluate the effectiveness of FedSA, we conduct experiments on both single-task and multi-task settings. Experimental results demonstrate that FedSA effectively amalgamates knowledge from decentralized models and achieves competitive performance to centralized baselines.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we explore a new knowledge-amalgamation problem, termed Federated Selective Aggregation (FedSA). FedSA 的目标是在几位分散的教师的帮助下训练一个新任务的学生模型，这些教师的预训练任务和数据是不同的且不可知的。 Our motivation for investigating such a problem setup stems from a recent dilemma of model sharing. Many researchers or institutes have spent enormous resources on training large and competent networks.然而，由于隐私、安全或知识产权问题，即使他们希望为社区做出贡献，他们也无法共享自己的预训练模型。拟议的 FedSA 为这一困境提供了一种解决方案，并使其更进一步，因为学识渊博的学生可能会专门从事一项与所有教师不同的新任务。 To this end, we proposed a dedicated strategy for handling FedSA.具体来说，我们的学生培训过程是由一种新颖的基于显着性的方法驱动的，该方法自适应地选择教师作为参与者，并将他们的代表能力整合到学生中。 To evaluate the effectiveness of FedSA, we conduct experiments on both single-task and multi-task settings.实验结果表明，FedSA 有效地融合了分散模型中的知识，并实现了与集中基线相比的竞争绩效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦选择性聚合（FedSA）方法，在无法共享预训练模型的情况下，通过去中心化教师模型训练学生模型以完成新任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型因隐私、安全或知识产权问题无法共享，但研究者希望贡献社区，需在不直接共享模型的前提下实现知识融合。
AI.method: 采用基于显著性的策略，自适应选择教师模型并整合其代表性能力到学生模型中。
AI.result: 实验表明FedSA在单任务和多任务场景下均能有效融合知识，性能接近集中式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedSA为模型共享困境提供了可行解决方案，验证了去中心化知识融合的有效性。

authors_text: Loïc Paulevé
title: Marker and source-marker reprogramming of Most Permissive Boolean networks and ensembles with BoNesis
title_zh: 使用 BoNesis 对最许可布尔网络和集成进行标记和源标记重新编程
comment: Notebook available at https://nbviewer.org/github/bnediction/reprogramming-with-bonesis/blob/release/paper.ipynb Peer-reviewed and recommended by Peer Community In "Mathematical and Computational Biology" (https://doi.org/10.24072/pci.mcb.100183)
comments: Notebook available at https://nbviewer.org/github/bnediction/reprogramming-with-bonesis/blob/release/paper.ipynb Peer-reviewed and recommended by Peer Community In "Mathematical and Computational Biology" (https://doi.org/10.24072/pci.mcb.100183)
abstract: Boolean networks (BNs) are discrete dynamical systems with applications to the modeling of cellular behaviors. In this paper, we demonstrate how the software BoNesis can be employed to exhaustively identify combinations of perturbations which enforce properties on their fixed points and attractors. We consider marker properties, which specify that some components are fixed to a specific value. We study 4 variants of the marker reprogramming problem: the reprogramming of fixed points, of minimal trap spaces, and of fixed points and minimal trap spaces reachable from a given initial configuration with the most permissive update mode. The perturbations consist of fixing a set of components to a fixed value. They can destroy and create new attractors. In each case, we give an upper bound on their theoretical computational complexity, and give an implementation of the resolution using the BoNesis Python framework. Finally, we lift the reprogramming problems to ensembles of BNs, as supported by BoNesis, bringing insight on possible and universal reprogramming strategies. This paper can be executed and modified interactively.
summary: Boolean networks (BNs) are discrete dynamical systems with applications to the modeling of cellular behaviors. In this paper, we demonstrate how the software BoNesis can be employed to exhaustively identify combinations of perturbations which enforce properties on their fixed points and attractors. We consider marker properties, which specify that some components are fixed to a specific value. We study 4 variants of the marker reprogramming problem: the reprogramming of fixed points, of minimal trap spaces, and of fixed points and minimal trap spaces reachable from a given initial configuration with the most permissive update mode. The perturbations consist of fixing a set of components to a fixed value. They can destroy and create new attractors. In each case, we give an upper bound on their theoretical computational complexity, and give an implementation of the resolution using the BoNesis Python framework. Finally, we lift the reprogramming problems to ensembles of BNs, as supported by BoNesis, bringing insight on possible and universal reprogramming strategies. This paper can be executed and modified interactively.
abstract_zh: 布尔网络 (BN) 是离散动态系统，应用于细胞行为建模。在本文中，我们演示了如何使用 BoNesis 软件来详尽地识别扰动组合，这些扰动组合在固定点和吸引子上强制执行属性。我们考虑标记属性，它指定某些组件固定为特定值。我们研究了标记重编程问题的 4 种变体：固定点的重新编程、最小陷阱空间的重新编程、以及从给定初始配置以最宽松的更新模式可到达的固定点和最小陷阱空间的重新编程。扰动包括将一组分量固定为固定值。它们可以破坏并创造新的吸引子。在每种情况下，我们都给出了理论计算复杂度的上限，并使用 BoNesis Python 框架给出了解决方案的实现。最后，在 BoNesis 的支持下，我们将重编程问题提升到 BN 集合，从而深入了解可能的通用重编程策略。本文可以交互执行和修改。

AI.tldr: 本文利用BoNesis工具研究布尔网络的标记重编程问题，通过扰动组合改变其固定点和吸引子属性，并扩展到网络集合分析。
AI.motivation: 布尔网络广泛用于建模细胞行为，但现有方法难以系统识别扰动以实现特定生物目标，需更高效的重编程策略。
AI.method: 基于BoNesis框架，提出四种标记重编程问题的求解方法，结合理论复杂度分析与Python实现，并扩展至网络集合的通用策略研究。
AI.result: 确定了四种重编程问题的计算复杂度上限，实现了BoNesis框架的解决方案，并揭示了网络集合中的可能重编程策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文为布尔网络的系统性重编程提供了工具和理论支持，为理解生物系统控制机制提供了新视角。

search_text: Marker and source-marker reprogramming of Most Permissive Boolean networks and ensembles with BoNesis 使用 BoNesis 对最许可布尔网络和集成进行标记和源标记重新编程 Boolean networks (BNs) are discrete dynamical systems with applications to the modeling of cellular behaviors. In this paper, we demonstrate how the software BoNesis can be employed to exhaustively identify combinations of perturbations which enforce properties on their fixed points and attractors. We consider marker properties, which specify that some components are fixed to a specific value. We study 4 variants of the marker reprogramming problem: the reprogramming of fixed points, of minimal trap spaces, and of fixed points and minimal trap spaces reachable from a given initial configuration with the most permissive update mode. The perturbations consist of fixing a set of components to a fixed value. They can destroy and create new attractors. In each case, we give an upper bound on their theoretical computational complexity, and give an implementation of the resolution using the BoNesis Python framework. Finally, we lift the reprogramming problems to ensembles of BNs, as supported by BoNesis, bringing insight on possible and universal reprogramming strategies. This paper can be executed and modified interactively. 布尔网络 (BN) 是离散动态系统，应用于细胞行为建模。在本文中，我们演示了如何使用 BoNesis 软件来详尽地识别扰动组合，这些扰动组合在固定点和吸引子上强制执行属性。我们考虑标记属性，它指定某些组件固定为特定值。我们研究了标记重编程问题的 4 种变体：固定点的重新编程、最小陷阱空间的重新编程、以及从给定初始配置以最宽松的更新模式可到达的固定点和最小陷阱空间的重新编程。扰动包括将一组分量固定为固定值。它们可以破坏并创造新的吸引子。在每种情况下，我们都给出了理论计算复杂度的上限，并使用 BoNesis Python 框架给出了解决方案的实现。最后，在 BoNesis 的支持下，我们将重编程问题提升到 BN 集合，从而深入了解可能的通用重编程策略。本文可以交互执行和修改。 本文利用BoNesis工具研究布尔网络的标记重编程问题，通过扰动组合改变其固定点和吸引子属性，并扩展到网络集合分析。 Loïc Paulevé eess.SY,cs.AI,q-bio.MN

authors_text: Tomoya Nitta,Tsubasa Hirakawa,Hironobu Fujiyoshi,Toru Tamaki
title: Object-ABN: Learning to Generate Sharp Attention Maps for Action Recognition
title_zh: Object-ABN：学习生成用于动作识别的清晰注意力图
abstract: In this paper we propose an extension of the Attention Branch Network (ABN) by using instance segmentation for generating sharper attention maps for action recognition. Methods for visual explanation such as Grad-CAM usually generate blurry maps which are not intuitive for humans to understand, particularly in recognizing actions of people in videos. Our proposed method, Object-ABN, tackles this issue by introducing a new mask loss that makes the generated attention maps close to the instance segmentation result. Further the PC loss and multiple attention maps are introduced to enhance the sharpness of the maps and improve the performance of classification. Experimental results with UCF101 and SSv2 shows that the generated maps by the proposed method are much clearer qualitatively and quantitatively than those of the original ABN.
summary: In this paper we propose an extension of the Attention Branch Network (ABN) by using instance segmentation for generating sharper attention maps for action recognition. Methods for visual explanation such as Grad-CAM usually generate blurry maps which are not intuitive for humans to understand, particularly in recognizing actions of people in videos. Our proposed method, Object-ABN, tackles this issue by introducing a new mask loss that makes the generated attention maps close to the instance segmentation result. Further the PC loss and multiple attention maps are introduced to enhance the sharpness of the maps and improve the performance of classification. Experimental results with UCF101 and SSv2 shows that the generated maps by the proposed method are much clearer qualitatively and quantitatively than those of the original ABN.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了注意力分支网络（ABN）的扩展，通过使用实例分割来生成用于动作识别的更清晰的注意力图。 Grad-CAM 等视觉解释方法通常会生成模糊的地图，这对于人类来说不直观，尤其是在识别视频中的人物动作时。我们提出的方法 Object-ABN 通过引入新的掩模损失来解决这个问题，使生成的注意力图接近实例分割结果。进一步引入PC损失和多重注意力图来增强图的清晰度并提高分类性能。 UCF101和SSv2的实验结果表明，该方法生成的地图在定性和定量上比原始ABN的地图更加清晰。

AI.tldr: 提出Object-ABN方法，利用实例分割生成更清晰的注意力图以提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Grad-CAM生成的注意力图模糊，难以直观理解视频中的人类动作，影响识别效果与可解释性。
AI.method: 引入实例分割生成注意力图，设计新的mask损失函数逼近分割结果，并结合PC损失与多注意力图优化清晰度与分类性能。
AI.result: 在UCF101和SSv2数据集上，生成的注意力图在定性和定量指标上均优于原始ABN，分类准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Object-ABN通过生成锐利注意力图有效提升动作识别性能，为视觉解释方法提供新思路。

authors_text: Mukund Varma T,Peihao Wang,Xuxi Chen,Tianlong Chen,Subhashini Venugopalan,Zhangyang Wang
title: Is Attention All That NeRF Needs?
title_zh: NeRF 需要的就是注意力吗？
abstract: We present Generalizable NeRF Transformer (GNT), a transformer-based architecture that reconstructs Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) and learns to renders novel views on the fly from source views. While prior works on NeRFs optimize a scene representation by inverting a handcrafted rendering equation, GNT achieves neural representation and rendering that generalizes across scenes using transformers at two stages. (1) The view transformer leverages multi-view geometry as an inductive bias for attention-based scene representation, and predicts coordinate-aligned features by aggregating information from epipolar lines on the neighboring views. (2) The ray transformer renders novel views using attention to decode the features from the view transformer along the sampled points during ray marching. Our experiments demonstrate that when optimized on a single scene, GNT can successfully reconstruct NeRF without an explicit rendering formula due to the learned ray renderer. When trained on multiple scenes, GNT consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance when transferring to unseen scenes and outperform all other methods by ~10% on average. Our analysis of the learned attention maps to infer depth and occlusion indicate that attention enables learning a physically-grounded rendering. Our results show the promise of transformers as a universal modeling tool for graphics. Please refer to our project page for video results: https://vita-group.github.io/GNT/.
summary: We present Generalizable NeRF Transformer (GNT), a transformer-based architecture that reconstructs Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) and learns to renders novel views on the fly from source views. While prior works on NeRFs optimize a scene representation by inverting a handcrafted rendering equation, GNT achieves neural representation and rendering that generalizes across scenes using transformers at two stages. (1) The view transformer leverages multi-view geometry as an inductive bias for attention-based scene representation, and predicts coordinate-aligned features by aggregating information from epipolar lines on the neighboring views. (2) The ray transformer renders novel views using attention to decode the features from the view transformer along the sampled points during ray marching. Our experiments demonstrate that when optimized on a single scene, GNT can successfully reconstruct NeRF without an explicit rendering formula due to the learned ray renderer. When trained on multiple scenes, GNT consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance when transferring to unseen scenes and outperform all other methods by ~10% on average. Our analysis of the learned attention maps to infer depth and occlusion indicate that attention enables learning a physically-grounded rendering. Our results show the promise of transformers as a universal modeling tool for graphics. Please refer to our project page for video results: https://vita-group.github.io/GNT/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了通用 NeRF Transformer (GNT)，这是一种基于 Transformer 的架构，可以重建神经辐射场 (NeRF) 并学习从源视图动态渲染新颖的视图。 NeRF 的先前工作通过反转手工渲染方程来优化场景表示，而 GNT 使用两个阶段的 Transformer 实现了跨场景泛化的神经表示和渲染。 (1) 视图变换器利用多视图几何作为基于注意力的场景表示的归纳偏差，并通过聚合相邻视图上极线的信息来预测坐标对齐特征。 (2) 光线变换器使用注意力来渲染新颖的视图，以在光线行进期间沿采样点解码来自视图变换器的特征。我们的实验表明，当在单个场景上进行优化时，由于学习了光线渲染器，GNT 可以成功重建 NeRF，而无需显式渲染公式。当在多个场景上进行训练时，GNT 在转移到未见过的场景时始终能够实现最先进的性能，并且平均优于所有其他方法约 10%。我们对学习到的注意力图进行分析以推断深度和遮挡，表明注意力能够学习基于物理的渲染。我们的结果显示了 Transformer 作为通用图形建模工具的前景。视频结果请参阅我们的项目页面：https://vita-group.github.io/GNT/。

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的通用NeRF重建与渲染方法
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF依赖手工渲染方程，难以跨场景泛化，需更通用的模型
AI.method: 采用两阶段Transformer：视图Transformer聚合多视图几何信息，射线Transformer通过注意力机制解码特征进行渲染
AI.result: 单场景下无需显式公式重建NeRF，多场景下平均超其他方法10%
AI.conclusion: 证明Transformer在图形任务中具有通用建模潜力

authors_text: Hongjae Lee,Changwoo Han,Jun-Sang Yoo,Seung-Won Jung
title: GPS-GLASS: Learning Nighttime Semantic Segmentation Using Daytime Video and GPS data
title_zh: GPS-GLASS：使用日间视频和 GPS 数据学习夜间语义分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation for autonomous driving should be robust against various in-the-wild environments. Nighttime semantic segmentation is especially challenging due to a lack of annotated nighttime images and a large domain gap from daytime images with sufficient annotation. In this paper, we propose a novel GPS-based training framework for nighttime semantic segmentation. Given GPS-aligned pairs of daytime and nighttime images, we perform cross-domain correspondence matching to obtain pixel-level pseudo supervision. Moreover, we conduct flow estimation between daytime video frames and apply GPS-based scaling to acquire another pixel-level pseudo supervision. Using these pseudo supervisions with a confidence map, we train a nighttime semantic segmentation network without any annotation from nighttime images. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on several nighttime semantic segmentation datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/GPS-GLASS.
summary: Semantic segmentation for autonomous driving should be robust against various in-the-wild environments. Nighttime semantic segmentation is especially challenging due to a lack of annotated nighttime images and a large domain gap from daytime images with sufficient annotation. In this paper, we propose a novel GPS-based training framework for nighttime semantic segmentation. Given GPS-aligned pairs of daytime and nighttime images, we perform cross-domain correspondence matching to obtain pixel-level pseudo supervision. Moreover, we conduct flow estimation between daytime video frames and apply GPS-based scaling to acquire another pixel-level pseudo supervision. Using these pseudo supervisions with a confidence map, we train a nighttime semantic segmentation network without any annotation from nighttime images. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on several nighttime semantic segmentation datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/GPS-GLASS.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶的语义分割应该对各种野外环境具有鲁棒性。由于缺乏带注释的夜间图像以及与具有足够注释的白天图像之间存在较大的域差距，夜间语义分割尤其具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 GPS 的夜间语义分割训练框架。给定 GPS 对齐的白天和夜间图像对，我们执行跨域对应匹配以获得像素级伪监督。此外，我们在白天视频帧之间进行流量估计，并应用基于 GPS 的缩放来获得另一个像素级伪监督。使用这些伪监督和置信图，我们训练夜间语义分割网络，而无需夜间图像的任何注释。实验结果证明了该方法在多个夜间语义分割数据集上的有效性。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/jimmy9704/GPS-GLASS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GPS-GLASS框架，利用白天视频和GPS数据进行夜间语义分割，无需夜间标注数据。
AI.motivation: 夜间语义分割因缺乏标注数据和昼夜域差距而具有挑战性，现有方法依赖标注数据难以适应真实场景。
AI.method: 通过GPS对齐的昼夜图像对进行跨域匹配生成伪监督，结合光流估计与GPS缩放获取像素级伪标签，并利用置信图训练分割网络。
AI.result: 在多个夜间数据集上验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GPS-GLASS通过融合GPS信息和昼夜数据，成功解决了夜间分割的标注缺失问题，为自动驾驶提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Ralph Joseph S. D. Ligueran,Manuel Luis C. Delos Santos,Ronaldo S. Tinio,Emmanuel H. Valencia
title: Applied Computer Vision on 2-Dimensional Lung X-Ray Images for Assisted Medical Diagnosis of Pneumonia
title_zh: 二维肺部 X 射线图像的计算机视觉应用，用于肺炎的辅助医学诊断
comment: ef:IJCSR Volume 7, March 1, 2022, ISSN print 2546-0552, ISSN online 2546-115X, pages 1239-1254
comments: ef:IJCSR Volume 7, March 1, 2022, ISSN print 2546-0552, ISSN online 2546-115X, pages 1239-1254
abstract: This study focuses on the application of a specific subfield of artificial intelligence referred to as computer vision in the analysis of 2-dimensional lung x-ray images for the assisted medical diagnosis of ordinary pneumonia. A convolutional neural network algorithm was implemented in a Python-coded, Flask-based web application that can analyze x-ray images for the detection of ordinary pneumonia. Since convolutional neural network algorithms rely on machine learning for the identification and detection of patterns, a technique referred to as transfer learning was implemented to train the neural network in the identification and detection of patterns within the dataset. Open-source lung x-ray images were used as training data to create a knowledge base that served as the core element of the web application and the experimental design employed a 5-Trial Confirmatory Test for the validation of the web application. The results of the 5-Trial Confirmatory Test show the calculation of Diagnostic Precision Percentage per Trial, General Diagnostic Precision Percentage, and General Diagnostic Error Percentage while the Confusion Matrix further shows the relationship between the label and the corresponding diagnosis result of the web application on each test images. The developed web application can be used by medical practitioners in A.I.-assisted diagnosis of ordinary pneumonia, and by researchers in the fields of computer science and bioinformatics.
summary: This study focuses on the application of a specific subfield of artificial intelligence referred to as computer vision in the analysis of 2-dimensional lung x-ray images for the assisted medical diagnosis of ordinary pneumonia. A convolutional neural network algorithm was implemented in a Python-coded, Flask-based web application that can analyze x-ray images for the detection of ordinary pneumonia. Since convolutional neural network algorithms rely on machine learning for the identification and detection of patterns, a technique referred to as transfer learning was implemented to train the neural network in the identification and detection of patterns within the dataset. Open-source lung x-ray images were used as training data to create a knowledge base that served as the core element of the web application and the experimental design employed a 5-Trial Confirmatory Test for the validation of the web application. The results of the 5-Trial Confirmatory Test show the calculation of Diagnostic Precision Percentage per Trial, General Diagnostic Precision Percentage, and General Diagnostic Error Percentage while the Confusion Matrix further shows the relationship between the label and the corresponding diagnosis result of the web application on each test images. The developed web application can be used by medical practitioners in A.I.-assisted diagnosis of ordinary pneumonia, and by researchers in the fields of computer science and bioinformatics.
abstract_zh: 本研究重点关注人工智能的一个特定子领域（称为计算机视觉）在二维肺部 X 射线图像分析中的应用，以辅助普通肺炎的医学诊断。在 Python 编码、基于 Flask 的 Web 应用程序中实现了卷积神经网络算法，该应用程序可以分析 X 射线图像以检测普通肺炎。由于卷积神经网络算法依赖于机器学习来识别和检测模式，因此采用了一种称为迁移学习的技术来训练神经网络识别和检测数据集中的模式。使用开源肺部 X 射线图像作为训练数据来创建知识库，作为 Web 应用程序的核心元素，实验设计采用 5 次试验验证测试来验证 Web 应用程序。 5次试验验证测试的结果显示了每次试验的诊断精度百分比、一般诊断精度百分比和一般诊断错误百分比的计算，而混淆矩阵进一步显示了每个测试图像上的标签与Web应用程序的相应诊断结果之间的关系。开发的网络应用程序可供医生用于普通肺炎的人工智能辅助诊断，也可供计算机科学和生物信息学领域的研究人员使用。

AI.tldr: 本论文开发了一个基于计算机视觉的Web应用，利用卷积神经网络分析2D肺部X光图像，辅助诊断普通肺炎。
AI.motivation: 通过人工智能技术提升肺炎诊断的准确性与效率，为医疗从业者提供辅助工具，并推动计算机科学与生物信息学领域的研究。
AI.method: 采用Python和Flask构建Web应用，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）结合迁移学习技术，基于开源肺部X光图像数据集进行训练，并通过5次试验确认测试验证模型性能。
AI.result: 5次试验确认测试计算了每轮诊断精确度百分比、总体诊断精确度及误差百分比，混淆矩阵展示了标签与诊断结果的关系，验证了Web应用的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 开发的Web应用可有效辅助肺炎诊断，具有临床应用潜力，未来可进一步优化模型并拓展至其他医学影像分析领域。

authors_text: Yu-Jie Chen,Shin-I Cheng,Wei-Chen Chiu,Hung-Yu Tseng,Hsin-Ying Lee
title: Vector Quantized Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 矢量量化图像到图像转换
abstract: Current image-to-image translation methods formulate the task with conditional generation models, leading to learning only the recolorization or regional changes as being constrained by the rich structural information provided by the conditional contexts. In this work, we propose introducing the vector quantization technique into the image-to-image translation framework. The vector quantized content representation can facilitate not only the translation, but also the unconditional distribution shared among different domains. Meanwhile, along with the disentangled style representation, the proposed method further enables the capability of image extension with flexibility in both intra- and inter-domains. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable performance to the state-of-the-art image-to-image translation and image extension methods. Compared to methods for individual tasks, the proposed method, as a unified framework, unleashes applications combining image-to-image translation, unconditional generation, and image extension altogether. For example, it provides style variability for image generation and extension, and equips image-to-image translation with further extension capabilities.
summary: Current image-to-image translation methods formulate the task with conditional generation models, leading to learning only the recolorization or regional changes as being constrained by the rich structural information provided by the conditional contexts. In this work, we propose introducing the vector quantization technique into the image-to-image translation framework. The vector quantized content representation can facilitate not only the translation, but also the unconditional distribution shared among different domains. Meanwhile, along with the disentangled style representation, the proposed method further enables the capability of image extension with flexibility in both intra- and inter-domains. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable performance to the state-of-the-art image-to-image translation and image extension methods. Compared to methods for individual tasks, the proposed method, as a unified framework, unleashes applications combining image-to-image translation, unconditional generation, and image extension altogether. For example, it provides style variability for image generation and extension, and equips image-to-image translation with further extension capabilities.
abstract_zh: 当前的图像到图像翻译方法使用条件生成模型来制定任务，导致仅学习受条件上下文提供的丰富结构信息约束的重新着色或区域变化。在这项工作中，我们建议将矢量量化技术引入到图像到图像的转换框架中。矢量量化的内容表示不仅可以促进翻译，而且可以促进不同领域之间共享的无条件分布。同时，随着解开的风格表示，所提出的方法进一步实现了在域内和域间灵活的图像扩展能力。定性和定量实验表明，我们的框架实现了与最先进的图像到图像转换和图像扩展方法相当的性能。与单个任务的方法相比，所提出的方法作为一个统一的框架，释放了将图像到图像转换、无条件生成和图像扩展相结合的应用程序。例如，它为图像生成和扩展提供风格可变性，并为图像到图像的翻译提供进一步的扩展功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合向量量化技术的图像到图像翻译框架，以提升跨域翻译与图像扩展能力。
AI.motivation: 现有条件生成模型受限于结构信息约束，难以实现无条件分布共享及灵活的跨域图像扩展。
AI.method: 引入向量量化内容表示与解耦风格表示，构建统一框架实现图像翻译、无条件生成与跨域扩展。
AI.result: 框架在图像翻译与扩展任务上达到SOTA水平，且能融合多种应用如风格生成与翻译扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架通过向量量化与解耦表示有效结合多任务，提升了图像生成与翻译的灵活性与性能。
